*Chaimae Chellaf,Salima Mdhaffar,Yannick Estève,Stéphane Huet*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SBARThez：基于多模态多语言句子嵌入和命名实体注入的抽象摘要框架，提升事实一致性，支持文本/语音输入和跨语言摘要


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 抽象摘要虽然能生成简洁的摘要，但容易产生"幻觉"问题，引入不存在的信息，导致事实不一致性

Method: 使用LaBSE、SONAR、BGE-M3等预训练模型的多模态多语言句子嵌入，输入到改进的BART法语模型中，并引入命名实体注入机制，将标记化的命名实体附加到解码器输入

Result: SBARThez在低资源语言上表现竞争力，相比词级基线模型能生成更简洁、更抽象的摘要

Conclusion: 提出的SBARThez框架能有效提升摘要的事实一致性，支持文本和语音输入，实现跨语言摘要，特别适用于低资源语言场景

Abstract: Abstractive summarization aims to generate concise summaries by creating new sentences, allowing for flexible rephrasing. However, this approach can be vulnerable to inaccuracies, particularly `hallucinations' where the model introduces non-existent information. In this paper, we leverage the use of multimodal and multilingual sentence embeddings derived from pretrained models such as LaBSE, SONAR, and BGE-M3, and feed them into a modified BART-based French model. A Named Entity Injection mechanism that appends tokenized named entities to the decoder input is introduced, in order to improve the factual consistency of the generated summary. Our novel framework, SBARThez, is applicable to both text and speech inputs and supports cross-lingual summarization; it shows competitive performance relative to token-level baselines, especially for low-resource languages, while generating more concise and abstract summaries.

</details>


### [78] [LAMUS: A Large-Scale Corpus for Legal Argument Mining from U.S. Caselaw using LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08286)
*Serene Wang,Lavanya Pobbathi,Haihua Chen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LAMUS：一个用于法律论证挖掘的句子级语料库，包含美国最高法院判决和德克萨斯州刑事上诉意见，采用LLM自动标注+人工验证的混合方法构建，支持六类句子分类任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 法律论证挖掘领域因缺乏大规模、高质量标注数据集（特别是州级案例）而发展受限，需要构建可扩展的资源来推动研究进展。

Method: 采用数据中心的流水线：大规模案例收集 + LLM自动标注 + 人工循环质量精炼。将法律论证挖掘定义为六类句子分类任务，评估多种通用和领域特定语言模型。

Result: 思维链提示显著提升LLM性能；领域特定模型在零样本场景下表现更稳定；LLM辅助验证纠正近20%标注错误；人工验证Cohen's Kappa达0.85，确认标注质量。

Conclusion: LAMUS为未来法律NLP研究提供了可扩展资源和实证见解，展示了混合标注方法的有效性，所有代码和数据集已开源。

Abstract: Legal argument mining aims to identify and classify the functional components of judicial reasoning, such as facts, issues, rules, analysis, and conclusions. Progress in this area is limited by the lack of large-scale, high-quality annotated datasets for U.S. caselaw, particularly at the state level. This paper introduces LAMUS, a sentence-level legal argument mining corpus constructed from U.S. Supreme Court decisions and Texas criminal appellate opinions. The dataset is created using a data-centric pipeline that combines large-scale case collection, LLM-based automatic annotation, and targeted human-in-the-loop quality refinement. We formulate legal argument mining as a six-class sentence classification task and evaluate multiple general-purpose and legal-domain language models under zero-shot, few-shot, and chain-of-thought prompting strategies, with LegalBERT as a supervised baseline. Results show that chain-of-thought prompting substantially improves LLM performance, while domain-specific models exhibit more stable zero-shot behavior. LLM-assisted verification corrects nearly 20% of annotation errors, improving label consistency. Human verification achieves Cohen's Kappa of 0.85, confirming annotation quality. LAMUS provides a scalable resource and empirical insights for future legal NLP research. All code and datasets can be accessed for reproducibility on GitHub at: https://github.com/LavanyaPobbathi/LAMUS/tree/main

</details>


### [79] [Learning Multiple Utterance-Level Attribute Representations with a Unified Speech Encoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08312)
*Maryem Bouziane,Salima Mdhaffar,Yannick Estève*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出统一后训练框架，让单个语音基础模型能生成多种话语级表示，同时学习语义和说话人表征，并在多语言语音检索和说话人识别任务中验证效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有语音基础模型主要学习声学帧级上下文嵌入，而SAMU-XSLR和SONAR等方法虽然能学习话语级语义表示，但只能针对特定属性。需要扩展这一范式，使单个模型能生成多种话语级表示。

Method: 提出统一后训练框架，扩展话语级属性学习范式，让单个语音基础模型能同时学习多种话语级表示（如语义和说话人表征），支持多任务应用。

Result: 通过联合学习语义和说话人表征，在多语言语音检索和说话人识别任务中验证了方法的有效性，展示了统一框架的实用价值。

Conclusion: 提出的统一后训练框架成功扩展了话语级表示学习范式，使单个语音基础模型能生成多种话语级表示，为多任务语音处理提供了灵活有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Speech foundation models trained with self-supervised learning produce generic speech representations that support a wide range of speech processing tasks. When further adapted with supervised learning, these models can achieve strong performance on specific downstream tasks. Recent post-training approaches, such as SAMU-XSLR and SONAR, align speech representations with utterance-level semantic representations, enabling effective multimodal (speech-text) and multilingual applications. While speech foundation models typically learn contextual embeddings at the acoustic frame level, these methods learn representations at the utterance level. In this work, we extend this paradigm to arbitrary utterance-level attributes and propose a unified post-training framework that enables a single speech foundation model to generate multiple types of utterance-level representations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach by jointly learning semantic and speaker representations and evaluating them on multilingual speech retrieval and speaker recognition tasks.

</details>


### [80] [SPD-RAG: Sub-Agent Per Document Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08329)
*Yagiz Can Akay,Muhammed Yusuf Kartal,Esra Alparslan,Faruk Ortakoyluoglu,Arda Akpinar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SPD-RAG是一个分层多智能体框架，通过文档级专业化分解跨文档问答问题，每个文档由专用智能体处理，协调器聚合部分答案，显著提升长上下文多文档QA性能并降低成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RAG管道在复杂跨文档查询中存在证据覆盖不全的问题，而长上下文LLM难以可靠地对海量输入进行推理。需要一种能够有效处理异构多文档设置、提高可扩展性和答案质量的解决方案。

Method: 提出SPD-RAG分层多智能体框架：1) 每个文档由专用文档级智能体处理，仅关注自身内容；2) 协调器分发任务给相关智能体并聚合部分答案；3) 通过令牌限制的合成层合并部分答案（支持递归map-reduce处理大规模语料库）。

Result: 在LOONG基准测试（EMNLP 2024）上，SPD-RAG获得58.1的平均分（GPT-5评估），显著优于普通RAG（33.0）和智能体RAG（32.8），同时仅使用完整上下文基线（68.0）38%的API成本。

Conclusion: SPD-RAG通过文档级专业化与集中融合，在异构多文档设置中提高了可扩展性和答案质量，同时提供了模块化、可扩展的检索管道，有效解决了跨文档问答中的证据覆盖和推理可靠性问题。

Abstract: Answering complex, real-world queries often requires synthesizing facts scattered across vast document corpora. In these settings, standard retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines suffer from incomplete evidence coverage, while long-context large language models (LLMs) struggle to reason reliably over massive inputs. We introduce SPD-RAG, a hierarchical multi-agent framework for exhaustive cross-document question answering that decomposes the problem along the document axis. Each document is processed by a dedicated document-level agent operating only on its own content, enabling focused retrieval, while a coordinator dispatches tasks to relevant agents and aggregates their partial answers. Agent outputs are synthesized by merging partial answers through a token-bounded synthesis layer (which supports recursive map-reduce for massive corpora). This document-level specialization with centralized fusion improves scalability and answer quality in heterogeneous multidocument settings while yielding a modular, extensible retrieval pipeline. On the LOONG benchmark (EMNLP 2024) for long-context multi-document QA, SPD-RAG achieves an Avg Score of 58.1 (GPT-5 evaluation), outperforming Normal RAG (33.0) and Agentic RAG (32.8) while using only 38% of the API cost of a full-context baseline (68.0).

</details>


### [81] [Do Language Models Know Theo Has a Wife? Investigating the Proviso Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08358)
*Tara Azin,Daniel Dumitrescu,Diana Inkpen,Raj Singh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文将语用学中的proviso问题重新表述为自然语言推理任务，构建诊断数据集评估语言模型在条件句预设投射上的表现，发现模型与人类判断大致一致但依赖浅层模式匹配而非语义推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是解决语用学中长期未解决的proviso问题——条件句中预设的理论解释与人类实际理解之间的差异，并评估语言模型处理这一复杂语用现象的能力。

Method: 方法包括：1) 将proviso问题重新表述为自然语言推理任务；2) 构建专门的诊断数据集来探测条件句中的预设投射；3) 评估RoBERTa、DeBERTa、LLaMA和Gemma等模型；4) 使用可解释性分析方法。

Result: 结果显示：1) 语言模型总体上与人类判断一致；2) 但模型主要依赖浅层模式匹配而非深层的语义或语用推理；3) 模型在处理预设投射时缺乏真正的语用理解能力。

Conclusion: 结论：1) 首次为proviso问题提供了计算评估框架；2) 强调需要采用诊断性、多方法评估语言模型的语用能力和上下文依赖意义理解；3) 当前模型在语用推理方面仍有局限。

Abstract: We investigate how language models handle the proviso problem, an unresolved issue in pragmatics where presuppositions in conditional sentences diverge between theoretical and human interpretations. We reformulate this phenomenon as a Natural Language Inference task and introduce a diagnostic dataset designed to probe presupposition projection in conditionals. We evaluate RoBERTa, DeBERTa, LLaMA, and Gemma using explainability analyses. The results show that models broadly align with human judgments but rely on shallow pattern matching rather than semantic or pragmatic reasoning. Our work provides the first computational evaluation framework for the proviso problem and highlights the need for diagnostic, multi-method approaches to assess pragmatic competence and context-dependent meaning in language models.

</details>


### [82] [Computational modeling of early language learning from acoustic speech and audiovisual input without linguistic priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08359)
*Okko Räsänen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该论文综述了使用计算模型理解婴儿早期语言习得的最新进展，重点关注自监督和视觉基础模型，展示了这些模型如何在不依赖强语言先验的情况下学习语音特征，并解释早期语言发展的许多特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管婴儿学习语言看似轻松，但从信息处理角度看，从声学语音中习得语言是巨大挑战。研究者希望通过计算模型来理解这一复杂过程，特别是自监督和视觉基础模型如何模拟婴儿的语言习得机制。

Method: 综述了自监督学习和视觉基础模型在语言习得研究中的应用。这些模型通过大量语音和视听输入进行训练，不依赖强语言先验，能够学习语音的各个方面，并与婴儿语言发展的实证发现进行对比验证。

Result: 现代学习模型在语音学习方面变得越来越强大，能够解释早期语言发展的许多特征。这些模型的学习原则与多种语言习得理论和人类认知理论兼容，并且模拟越来越接近现实，包括输入数据的真实性和与婴儿实证研究的联系。

Conclusion: 计算模型为理解早期语言习得提供了有力工具，自监督和视觉基础模型展示了共享的学习原则如何解释语言发展特征。随着模型输入和验证方法的改进，这些模拟正变得越来越真实，有助于统一不同语言习得理论。

Abstract: Learning to understand speech appears almost effortless for typically developing infants, yet from an information-processing perspective, acquiring a language from acoustic speech is an enormous challenge. This chapter reviews recent developments in using computational models to understand early language acquisition from speech and audiovisual input. The focus is on self-supervised and visually grounded models of perceptual learning. We show how these models are becoming increasingly powerful in learning various aspects of speech without strong linguistic priors, and how many features of early language development can be explained through a shared set of learning principles-principles broadly compatible with multiple theories of language acquisition and human cognition. We also discuss how modern learning simulations are gradually becoming more realistic, both in terms of input data and in linking model behavior to empirical findings on infant language development.

</details>


### [83] [Adaptive Loops and Memory in Transformers: Think Harder or Know More?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08391)
*Markus Frey,Behzad Shomali,Ali Hamza Bashir,David Berghaus,Mehdi Ali*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出结合自适应逐层循环和门控记忆库的Transformer模型，在数学推理任务上优于参数和计算量匹配的基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 链式思维提示需要显式语言化中间步骤，而循环Transformer通过隐藏状态迭代优化表示，但缺乏深层模型的存储能力。需要结合循环机制和记忆存储来提升推理能力。

Method: 提出具有自适应逐层循环的Transformer模型：每个Transformer块通过学习的停止机制迭代其隐藏状态，同时引入门控记忆库提供额外的学习存储。

Result: 循环机制主要提升数学推理能力，记忆库帮助恢复常识任务性能。两者结合在数学基准测试上优于计算量匹配的基线模型（基线层数多三倍）。模型内部分析显示层间专业化：早期层循环少且少用记忆，后期层循环多且多用记忆。

Conclusion: 结合自适应循环和记忆库的Transformer模型能有效提升推理能力，特别是在数学任务上，同时保持参数效率，揭示了不同层在推理过程中的专业化分工。

Abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting enables reasoning in language models but requires explicit verbalization of intermediate steps. Looped transformers offer an alternative by iteratively refining representations within hidden states. This parameter efficiency comes at a cost, as looped models lack the storage capacity of deeper models which use unique weights per layer. In this work, we investigate transformer models that feature both adaptive per-layer looping, where each transformer block learns to iterate its hidden state via a learned halting mechanism, and gated memory banks, that provide additional learned storage. We find that looping primarily benefits mathematical reasoning, while memory banks help recover performance on commonsense tasks compared to parameter and FLOP matched models. Combining both mechanisms yields a model that outperforms an iso-FLOP baseline -- with three times the number of layers -- on math benchmarks. Analysis of model internals reveals layer specialization: early layers learn to loop minimally and access memory sparingly, while later layers do both more heavily.

</details>


### [84] [COACH meets QUORUM: A Framework and Pipeline for Aligning User, Expert and Developer Perspectives in LLM-generated Health Counselling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08392)
*Yee Man Ng,Bram van Dijk,Pieter Beynen,Otto Boekesteijn,Joris Jansen,Gerard van Oortmerssen,Max van Duijn,Marco Spruit*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: QUORUM是一个统一开发者、专家和用户视角的评估框架，用于评估健康咨询系统；COACH是一个基于大语言模型的个性化生活方式咨询生成管道，应用于癌症患者的日记应用。多利益相关方评估显示咨询相关、质量好且可靠，但在语气、错误敏感性和幻觉方面存在分歧。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发收集睡眠、情绪和活动数据的系统可为慢性病患者提供有价值的生活方式咨询，但这类系统开发具有挑战性：需要从用户数据中可靠提取模式，结合医学知识确保咨询质量，并生成对真实用户相关的咨询。

Method: 提出了QUORUM评估框架，统一开发者、专家和用户三种视角；开发了COACH，一个基于大语言模型的个性化生活方式咨询生成管道，应用于Healthy Chronos（癌症患者日记应用）用例。

Result: 应用该框架显示，用户、医学专家和开发者总体上认为生成的咨询相关、质量好且可靠。但利益相关方在咨询语气、模式提取错误的敏感性以及潜在幻觉方面存在分歧。

Conclusion: 多利益相关方评估对消费健康语言技术至关重要，统一的评估框架可以支持在真实世界环境中建立可信赖、以患者为中心的NLP系统。

Abstract: Systems that collect data on sleep, mood, and activities can provide valuable lifestyle counselling to populations affected by chronic disease and its consequences. Such systems are, however, challenging to develop; besides reliably extracting patterns from user-specific data, systems should also contextualise these patterns with validated medical knowledge to ensure the quality of counselling, and generate counselling that is relevant to a real user. We present QUORUM, a new evaluation framework that unifies these developer-, expert-, and user-centric perspectives, and show with a real case study that it meaningfully tracks convergence and divergence in stakeholder perspectives. We also present COACH, a Large Language Model-driven pipeline to generate personalised lifestyle counselling for our Healthy Chronos use case, a diary app for cancer patients and survivors. Applying our framework shows that overall, users, medical experts, and developers converge on the opinion that the generated counselling is relevant, of good quality, and reliable. However, stakeholders also diverge on the tone of the counselling, sensitivity to errors in pattern-extraction, and potential hallucinations. These findings highlight the importance of multi-stakeholder evaluation for consumer health language technologies and illustrate how a unified evaluation framework can support trustworthy, patient-centered NLP systems in real-world settings.

</details>


### [85] [Revealing Behavioral Plasticity in Large Language Models: A Token-Conditional Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08398)
*Liyuan Mao,Le Yu,Jing Zhou,Chujie Zheng,Bowen Yu,Chang Gao,Shixuan Liu,An Yang,Weinan Zhang,JunYang Lin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLMs具有变色龙般的可塑性，可通过token条件生成和强化学习稳定化，实现推理时行为模式切换而不需重新训练


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 发现LLMs具有内在的行为可塑性，但需要系统化方法来稳定这种能力，使模型能在不同任务间灵活切换行为模式而不损失能力

Method: 提出Token-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (ToCoRL)框架：1) 通过token前缀条件生成暴露模型可塑性；2) 使用强化学习将推理时适应转化为稳定可学习的行为模式；3) 结合token条件生成引导探索和强化学习增强利用

Result: ToCoRL实现了精确的行为控制且不降低模型能力，特别是让大型推理模型在保持复杂数学推理能力的同时，也能在事实问答任务上表现出色

Conclusion: LLMs具有变色龙般的行为可塑性，ToCoRL框架能系统化地利用和稳定这种能力，实现推理时灵活的行为模式切换，为模型行为控制提供了新方法

Abstract: In this work, we reveal that Large Language Models (LLMs) possess intrinsic behavioral plasticity-akin to chameleons adapting their coloration to environmental cues-that can be exposed through token-conditional generation and stabilized via reinforcement learning. Specifically, by conditioning generation on carefully selected token prefixes sampled from responses exhibiting desired behaviors, LLMs seamlessly adapt their behavioral modes at inference time (e.g., switching from step-by-step reasoning to direct answering) without retraining. Based on this insight, we propose Token-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning (ToCoRL), a principled framework that leverages RL to internalize this chameleon-like plasticity, transforming transient inference-time adaptations into stable and learnable behavioral patterns. ToCoRL guides exploration with token-conditional generation and keep enhancing exploitation, enabling emergence of appropriate behaviors. Extensive experiments show that ToCoRL enables precise behavioral control without capability degradation. Notably, we show that large reasoning models, while performing strongly on complex mathematics, can be effectively adapted to excel at factual question answering, which was a capability previously hindered by their step-by-step reasoning patterns.

</details>


### [86] [Aligning to Illusions: Choice Blindness in Human and AI Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08412)
*Wenbin Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: RLHF偏好标注存在构造性问题：人类选择盲视、LLM评委依赖浅层匹配而非真实监控，且标准评估指标无法检测标签污染，导致下游策略性能下降


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战RLHF假设人类标注者的偏好反映稳定内部状态，揭示偏好标注过程中存在系统性盲点

Method: 三个实验：1) 人类选择盲视研究（偏好替换实验）；2) 15个LLM评委测试（上下文操纵和社会压力）；3) 剂量响应实验（标签污染对奖励信号和策略的影响）

Result: 91%的偏好替换未被察觉；LLM评委依赖浅层文本匹配而非真实监控；1/6到1/3标签污染即导致奖励信号减半但标准指标不变；50%污染时奖励引导选择与随机采样无异

Conclusion: RLHF的偏好信号受标注环境影响，人类元认知、LLM自我监控和标准评估指标均无法检测，存在偏好构造问题

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) assumes annotator preferences reflect stable internal states. We challenge this through three experiments spanning the preference pipeline. In a human choice blindness study, 91% of surreptitiously swapped preferences go undetected, extending choice blindness to third-person evaluative comparison of unfamiliar text. Testing fifteen LLM judges as potential replacements, we find detection relies on shallow text matching rather than genuine self-monitoring: removing prior reasoning from context causes blindness to surge from near-zero to over 50%, while explicit social pressure induces near-universal compliance. In a dose-response experiment across two architectures from 86M to 2B parameters, one-sixth to one-third of labels must be corrupted before the reward signal halves, yet standard pairwise accuracy remains virtually unchanged. A Best-of-N evaluation confirms this translates to downstream policy degradation: at 50% corruption, reward-guided selection produces no improvement over random sampling, while the proxy model reports monotonically increasing scores. Together, these results reveal a preference construction problem: the signal entering RLHF is shaped by elicitation context in ways that neither human metacognition, LLM self-monitoring, nor standard evaluation metrics can detect.

</details>


### [87] [One Model Is Enough: Native Retrieval Embeddings from LLM Agent Hidden States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08429)
*Bo Jiang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 为LLM代理添加轻量级投影头，使其能够直接使用自身隐藏状态进行检索，无需单独的嵌入模型，在保持97%检索质量的同时降低复杂度和延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM代理检索外部知识时通常需要生成搜索查询文本，然后运行单独的嵌入模型将其编码为向量。这种两模型流水线增加了基础设施复杂性和延迟，且存在冗余：LLM已经在隐藏状态中编码了完整的对话上下文。

Method: 为LLM代理添加轻量级投影头，将隐藏状态直接映射到嵌入空间，消除对单独嵌入模型的需求。使用对齐损失、对比损失和排名蒸馏损失的组合进行训练。

Result: 在QReCC对话搜索基准测试中，Recall@10和MRR@10与标准的生成-编码流水线相比具有竞争力，同时保持了97%的基线检索质量。系统消融实验确认了每个损失组件的贡献。

Conclusion: 通过为LLM代理添加原生检索能力，可以直接使用LLM自身的表示进行搜索，显著降低系统复杂性和延迟，同时保持高质量的检索性能。

Abstract: LLM agents that retrieve external knowledge typically generate a search query as text, then run a separate embedding model to encode it into a vector. This two-model pipeline adds infrastructure complexity and latency, yet is redundant: the LLM already encodes the full conversational context in its hidden states. We propose equipping LLM agents with native retrieval capability by adding a lightweight projection head that maps hidden states directly into the embedding space, eliminating the need for a separate embedding model. Trained with a combination of alignment, contrastive, and rank distillation losses, our method retains 97\% of baseline retrieval quality while enabling the LLM agent to search with its own representations. Experiments on the QReCC conversational search benchmark show competitive Recall@10 and MRR@10 compared to the standard generate-then-encode pipeline, with systematic ablations confirming the contribution of each loss component.

</details>


### [88] [A Dataset for Probing Translationese Preferences in English-to-Swedish Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08450)
*Jenny Kunz,Anja Jarochenko,Marcel Bollmann*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文介绍首个英译瑞典语翻译腔数据集，包含翻译腔句子与地道替代句，用于探究语言模型的内在偏好，发现模型常偏爱翻译腔表达


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 翻译常带有源语言痕迹（翻译腔），需要研究语言模型对翻译腔和地道表达的偏好，以开发更自然的非英语语言模型输出

Method: 创建首个公开的英译瑞典语翻译腔数据集，包含翻译腔句子、地道替代句、错误标签和问题描述，用瑞典语和多语言LLM进行实验评估

Result: 模型常偏爱翻译腔表达；省略英语源句时人类替代句被选择更多，表明源语言暴露使模型偏向直译；即使无上下文模型也常偏好翻译腔变体

Conclusion: 数据集和发现为开发能产出更自然地道非英语输出的模型提供了资源和基准

Abstract: Translations often carry traces of the source language, a phenomenon known as translationese. We introduce the first freely available English-to-Swedish dataset contrasting translationese sentences with idiomatic alternatives, designed to probe intrinsic preferences of language models. It includes error tags and descriptions of the problems in the original translations. In experiments evaluating smaller Swedish and multilingual LLMs with our dataset, we find that they often favor the translationese phrasing. Human alternatives are chosen more often when the English source sentence is omitted, indicating that exposure to the source biases models toward literal translations, although even without context models often prefer the translationese variant. Our dataset and findings provide a resource and benchmark for developing models that produce more natural, idiomatic output in non-English languages.

</details>


### [89] [Fanar-Sadiq: A Multi-Agent Architecture for Grounded Islamic QA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08501)
*Ummar Abbas,Mourad Ouzzani,Mohamed Y. Eltabakh,Omar Sinan,Gagan Bhatia,Hamdy Mubarak,Majd Hawasly,Mohammed Qusay Hashim,Kareem Darwish,Firoj Alam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 论文提出了Fanar-Sadiq，一个双语（阿拉伯语/英语）多智能体伊斯兰助手，通过专门的模块化架构处理多样化的伊斯兰查询，包括教法回答、经文查找和确定性计算等。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在回答宗教知识查询时经常产生幻觉和错误归因来源，这在伊斯兰背景下尤其严重，因为用户期望基于经典文本（古兰经和圣训）和教法学细节的准确回答。虽然检索增强生成（RAG）通过外部证据有所改善，但单一的"检索-生成"流水线难以处理伊斯兰查询的多样性。

Method: 开发了Fanar-Sadiq系统，采用多智能体、工具使用的架构，将伊斯兰相关查询路由到专门的模块：意图感知路由、基于检索的教法回答（带确定性引用标准化和验证跟踪）、精确经文查找（带引文验证）、以及用于逊尼派天课和继承的确定性计算器（带教法学派敏感分支）。

Result: 在公共伊斯兰问答基准测试中展示了端到端系统的有效性和效率。该系统已通过API和Web应用公开免费访问，在不到一年内被访问约190万次。

Conclusion: Fanar-Sadiq通过模块化、多智能体架构有效解决了伊斯兰查询的多样性需求，提供了比单一RAG流水线更准确和可靠的回答，满足了用户对经典文本准确性和教法学细节的需求。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can answer religious knowledge queries fluently, yet they often hallucinate and misattribute sources, which is especially consequential in Islamic settings where users expect grounding in canonical texts (Qur'an and Hadith) and jurisprudential (fiqh) nuance. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces some of these limitations by grounding generation in external evidence. However, a single ``retrieve-then-generate'' pipeline is limited to deal with the diversity of Islamic queries.Users may request verbatim scripture, fatwa-style guidance with citations or rule-constrained computations such as zakat and inheritance that require strict arithmetic and legal invariants. In this work, we present a bilingual (Arabic/English) multi-agent Islamic assistant, called Fanar-Sadiq, which is a core component of the Fanar AI platform. Fanar-Sadiq routes Islamic-related queries to specialized modules within an agentic, tool-using architecture. The system supports intent-aware routing, retrieval-grounded fiqh answers with deterministic citation normalization and verification traces, exact verse lookup with quotation validation, and deterministic calculators for Sunni zakat and inheritance with madhhab-sensitive branching. We evaluate the complete end-to-end system on public Islamic QA benchmarks and demonstrate effectiveness and efficiency. Our system is currently publicly and freely accessible through API and a Web application, and has been accessed $\approx$1.9M times in less than a year.

</details>


### [90] [CODA: Difficulty-Aware Compute Allocation for Adaptive Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08659)
*Siye Wu,Jian Xie,Yikai Zhang,Yanghua Xiao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CODA是一种自适应推理方法，通过难度感知动态分配计算资源，简单任务减少60%计算成本，困难任务鼓励深度推理以最大化性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型在复杂任务上表现出色，但存在"过度思考"简单问题的问题，即对简单问题进行重复推理，计算成本高但准确率提升有限。这促使需要自适应推理，根据问题难度动态调整推理深度。

Method: CODA将自适应推理形式化为效用最大化问题，通过基于组的rollout估计难度信号，映射到两个非负门控，调节基于长度的整形奖励。简单侧门控惩罚简单实例的冗长推理，困难侧门控鼓励困难实例的深度推理。

Result: 在不同模型规模和基准测试中，CODA实现了自适应推理，无需外部标注或用户提供预算：在简单任务上减少超过60%的token成本同时保持高准确率，在困难任务上激励更多深思熟虑的推理以最大化性能。

Conclusion: CODA通过难度感知的计算分配实现了高效的自适应推理，解决了大型推理模型过度思考简单问题的问题，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本。

Abstract: The emergence of large reasoning models demonstrates that scaling inference-time compute significantly enhances performance on complex tasks. However, it often falls into another trap: overthinking simple problems, where repetitive rationales yield minimal accuracy gains at a disproportionately high cost. This motivates adaptive reasoning: dynamically aligning reasoning depth with instance difficulty. In this paper, we study adaptive reasoning from an optimality perspective, formalizing it as a utility maximization problem where tokens are allocated until the marginal accuracy gain falls below the incremental cost. Based on this, we propose CODA (Compute Allocation by Difficulty Awareness), a method that operationalizes this principle by allocating tokens via a policy-internal difficulty signal. Specifically, CODA estimates difficulty via group-based rollouts and maps it to two non-negative gates that modulate a length-dependent shaping term on top of the binary base reward. The easy-side gate penalizes verbosity on simple instances, whereas the hard-side gate encourages more deliberative rollouts on challenging ones. Across model scales and benchmarks, CODA achieves adaptive reasoning without external annotations or user-provided budgets: on easy tasks, CODA reduces token costs by over 60% while maintaining strong accuracy, whereas on hard tasks it incentivizes more deliberative rollouts to maximize performance.

</details>


<div id='econ.EM'></div>

# econ.EM [[Back]](#toc)

### [91] [Hippocratic Utility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06820)
*Tomasz Strzalecki*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 该论文讨论了一种效用函数的不对称性：更重视通过不施加有害治疗而拯救的生命，而较少重视通过治疗本会死亡的人而拯救的生命。作者承认这种不对称性的伦理动机，但通过示例说明其适用范围有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分析一种特定的效用函数不对称性在医疗决策中的伦理基础和实际应用限制。作者旨在探讨这种伦理原则在现实决策场景中的可行性边界。

Method: 通过构造具体的示例来说明该效用函数不对称性的应用局限。作者使用案例分析方法来展示这种决策准则在实践中的限制。

Result: 作者发现，虽然这种效用函数的不对称性在伦理上有其合理性，但其实际适用范围可能比预期的要有限。具体示例表明该决策准则在某些情况下可能无法提供明确的指导。

Conclusion: 尽管承认不对称效用函数的伦理动机，但作者得出结论：这种决策准则的适用范围有限，需要在更广泛的伦理框架和实际约束下谨慎应用。

Abstract: A utility function has been proposed that values more those lives that are saved by not imposing a harmful treatment and values less those lives that could be saved by treating people who would otherwise die. I do not dispute the ethical motivation behind this kind of asymmetry. However, as my example illustrates, the scope of applicability of such a decision criterion may be limited.

</details>


### [92] [On the Rates of Convergence of Induced Ordered Statistics and their Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07255)
*Federico A. Bugni,Ivan A. Canay,Deborah Kim*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 该论文提出了诱导顺序统计量(IOS)的一般收敛率理论，适用于回归断点设计、k近邻方法等场景，放宽了现有理论对边界点的限制条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IOS渐近理论要求维度随样本量增长时满足过于严格的平滑性条件，排除了回归断点设计中关键的边界点。需要开发更一般、更弱的假设下的收敛率理论。

Method: 在二次均值可微性和标准平滑性条件下，推导了目标条件分布在Hellinger距离和总变差距离下的边际收敛率，并展示了这些边际率如何转化为IOS向量的联合收敛率。

Result: 建立了平滑性与收敛速度之间的权衡关系，识别了Hellinger距离和总变差距离表现不同的机制，并提供了最近邻数量的显式增长条件。理论同时适用于内部点和边界点。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了更广泛适用的IOS收敛率理论，特别适用于回归断点设计等需要处理边界点的实际应用场景，补充了现有理论的局限性。

Abstract: Induced order statistics (IOS) arise when sample units are reordered according to the value of an auxiliary variable, and the associated responses are analyzed in that induced order. IOS play a central role in applications where the goal is to approximate the conditional distribution of an outcome at a fixed covariate value using observations whose covariates lie closest to that point, including regression discontinuity designs, k-nearest-neighbor methods, and distributionally robust optimization. Existing asymptotic results allow the dimension of the IOS vector to grow with the sample size only under smoothness conditions that are often too restrictive for practical data-generating processes. In particular, these conditions rule out boundary points, which are central to regression discontinuity designs. This paper develops general convergence rates for IOS under primitive and comparatively weak assumptions. We derive sharp marginal rates for the approximation of the target conditional distribution in Hellinger and total variation distances under quadratic mean differentiability and show how these marginal rates translate into joint convergence rates for the IOS vector. Our results are widely applicable: they rely on a standard smoothness condition and accommodate both interior and boundary conditioning points, as required in regression discontinuity and related settings. In the supplementary appendix, we provide complementary results under a Taylor/Holder remainder condition. Our results reveal a clear trade-off between smoothness and speed of convergence, identify regimes in which Hellinger and total variation distances behave differently, and provide explicit growth conditions on the number of nearest neighbors.

</details>


### [93] [ForeComp: An R Package for Comparing Predictive Accuracy Using Fixed-Smoothing Asymptotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07458)
*Minchul Shin,Nathan Schor*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: ForeComp是一个R包，用于通过Diebold-Mariano类型检验比较预测准确性，提供标准和平滑推断方法，包含可视化诊断工具Plot Tradeoff。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在预测分析中，需要可靠的方法来比较不同预测模型的准确性。Diebold-Mariano检验是常用的方法，但实际应用中需要更全面的工具来处理推断问题和可视化诊断。

Method: 开发R包ForeComp，提供基于损失差异的检验框架，支持标准和平滑推断方法，包含Plot Tradeoff可视化工具用于带宽敏感性和大小-功效权衡分析。

Result: 通过专业预测者调查应用和蒙特卡洛模拟验证了工具包的有效性，展示了有限样本性能表现。

Conclusion: ForeComp为预测准确性比较提供了全面的R工具包，结合了统计检验和可视化诊断，有助于更可靠的预测模型评估。

Abstract: We introduce ForeComp, an R package for comparing predictive accuracy using Diebold-Mariano type tests of equal predictive ability with standard and fixed smoothing inference. The package provides a common interface for loss differential based testing and includes Plot Tradeoff, a visual diagnostic for bandwidth sensitivity and the size-power tradeoff. We illustrate the toolkit with Survey of Professional Forecasters applications and Monte Carlo evidence on finite-sample performance.

</details>


### [94] [Identification and Counterfactual Analysis in Incomplete Models with Support and Moment Restrictions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07722)
*Lixiong Li*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 论文提出了一个统一的识别框架，用于处理具有支撑条件和矩条件限制的不完全模型中的反事实分析，将参数识别与反事实分析视为同构任务，并扩展了支撑函数方法的锐度结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统反事实分析采用"先估计后模拟"的两步法，需要从具有集合预测的模型中模拟结果。这种方法在处理不完全模型（具有支撑和矩限制）时存在局限性，特别是当传统锐度条件被违反时，需要更统一的框架来直接进行反事实分析。

Method: 通过将反事实限制嵌入增强的结构模型规范中，绕过传统的"估计-模拟"流程。扩展支撑函数方法的锐度结果，超越可积有界条件，证明支撑函数方法对于识别集的矩闭包仍然是锐的。引入不可约性条件，要求所有支撑含义都显式化。

Result: 证明了结构参数识别与反事实分析是同构任务。支撑函数方法在传统锐度失败的反事实设置中仍然适用。对于不可约模型，识别集与其矩闭包在有限样本中统计上不可区分。阐明了支撑限制和矩限制在实证实践中的不同作用。

Conclusion: 该框架为不完全模型中的反事实分析提供了统一的识别方法，允许直接进行反事实推断而无需模拟，扩展了支撑函数方法的适用范围，并澄清了不同类型限制在实证分析中的作用。

Abstract: This paper develops a unified identification framework for counterfactual analysis in incomplete models characterized by support and moment restrictions. I demonstrate that identifying structural parameters and conducting counterfactual analyses are isomorphic tasks. By embedding counterfactual restrictions within an augmented structural model specification, this approach bypasses the conventional "estimate-then-simulate" workflow and the need to simulate outcomes from models with set predictions. To make this approach operational, I extend sharp identification results for the support-function approach beyond the integrable boundedness condition that is imposed in sharp random-set characterizations but may be violated in economically relevant counterfactual analyses. Under minimal regularity conditions, I prove that the support-function approach remains sharp for the $moment$ $closure$ of the identified set. Furthermore, I introduce an irreducibility condition requiring all support implications to be made explicit. I show that for irreducible models, the identified set and its moment closure are statistically indistinguishable in finite samples. Together, these results justify using support-function methods in counterfactual settings where traditional sharpness fails and clarify the distinct roles of support and moment restrictions in empirical practice.

</details>


### [95] [Testing for Endogeneity: A Moment-Based Bayesian Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07780)
*Siddhartha Chib,Minchul Shin,Anna Simoni*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于指数倾斜经验似然的贝叶斯因子检验方法，用于检测线性回归模型中的内生性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 贝叶斯线性回归通常假设解释变量是外生的（与误差项不相关），但实践中这一假设可能不成立。需要开发一种能够检验内生性的贝叶斯方法。

Method: 使用指数倾斜经验似然框架，构建贝叶斯因子检验，比较基础模型（仅在外生性成立时正确）和扩展模型（无论内生性是否成立都正确）。

Result: 从频率学派角度看，该检验方法具有一致性：当样本量增大时，几乎必然选择正确模型（外生时选基础模型，内生时选扩展模型）。通过模拟数据和实际应用验证了方法有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的贝叶斯因子检验能够有效检测线性回归中的内生性问题，在理论和实证上都表现出良好性能。

Abstract: A standard assumption in the Bayesian estimation of linear regression models is that the regressors are exogenous in the sense that they are uncorrelated with the model error term. In practice, however, this assumption can be invalid. In this paper, using the exponentially tilted empirical likelihood framework, we develop a Bayes factor test for endogeneity that compares a base model that is correctly specified under exogeneity but misspecified under endogeneity against an extended model that is correctly specified in either case. We provide a comprehensive study of the log-marginal exponentially tilted empirical likelihood. We demonstrate that our testing procedure is consistent from a frequentist point of view: as the sample grows, it almost surely selects the base model if and only if the regressors are exogenous, and the extended model if and only if the regressors are endogenous. The methods are illustrated with simulated data, and problems concerning the causal effect of automobile prices on automobile demand and the causal effect of potentially endogenous airplane ticket prices on passenger volume.

</details>


### [96] [At-Risk Transformation for U.S. Recession Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07813)
*Rahul Billakanti,Minchul Shin*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 使用二元化预测因子（"风险"转换）替代连续标准化变量，能显著提升美国经济衰退预测的样本外表现，尤其在衰退初期效果明显。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统衰退预测模型使用连续标准化变量，但经济衰退是罕见离散事件，连续变量可能无法有效捕捉这种特性。作者希望通过二元化转换更好地反映预测因子的异常弱状态。

Method: 提出"风险"转换方法，将连续预测因子转换为二元指标：基于训练数据估计阈值规则，将预测因子转换为指示异常弱状态的二元变量。使用美国月度宏观经济和金融数据大面板进行验证。

Result: 二元化预测因子能持续改善样本外预测性能，使线性模型与灵活机器学习方法竞争，且在衰退开始阶段改进效果尤为显著。

Conclusion: 二元化预测因子能有效捕捉经济衰退等罕见离散事件的特性，是改进衰退预测的有效方法，特别适用于衰退初期预测。

Abstract: We propose a simple binarization of predictors, an "at-risk" transformation, as an alternative to the standard practice of using continuous, standardized variables in recession forecasting models. By converting predictors into indicators of unusually weak states based on a thresholding rule estimated from training data, we demonstrate their ability to capture the discrete nature of rare events such as U.S. recessions. Using a large panel of monthly U.S. macroeconomic and financial data, we show that binarized predictors consistently improve out-of-sample forecasting performance, often making linear models competitive with flexible machine learning methods, and that the gains are particularly pronounced around the onset of recessions.

</details>


### [97] [Event-Study Designs for Discrete Outcomes under Transition Independence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07914)
*Young Ahn,Hiroyuki Kasahara*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 提出一种新的面板数据识别策略，用于离散结果的ATT估计，替代传统双重差分法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统双重差分法(DiD)在分类数据中经常违反平行趋势假设，存在均值回归、超出范围的反事实以及多分类结果趋势定义不清等问题

Method: 提出转移独立性识别策略：假设在没有处理的情况下，基于处理前结果的转移动态在处理组和对照组之间相同；引入潜在类型马尔可夫结构来捕捉未观测异质性

Result: 三个实证应用显示ATT估计与传统DiD方法有显著差异

Conclusion: 为离散结果的面板数据提供了一种更可靠的ATT识别方法，能够处理传统DiD在分类数据中的局限性

Abstract: We develop a new identification strategy for average treatment effects on the treated (ATT) in panel data with discrete outcomes. Standard difference-in-differences (DiD) relies on parallel trends, which is frequently violated in categorical settings due to mean reversion, out-of-bounds counterfactuals, and ill-defined trends for multi-category outcomes. We propose an alternative identification strategy with transition independence: absent treatment, transition dynamics conditional on pre-treatment outcomes are identical between control and treated groups. To capture unobserved heterogeneity, we introduce a latent-type Markov structure delivering type-specific and aggregate treatment effects from short panels. Three empirical applications yield ATT estimates substantially different from conventional DiD.

</details>


### [98] [Online Learning in Semiparametric Econometric Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08614)
*Xiaohong Chen,Elie Tamer,Qingsong Yao*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 提出在线学习框架用于半参数单调指标模型，采用两阶段学习范式，实现流数据下的实时参数更新和推断


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代经济和金融应用中的数据通常以流的形式到达，需要实时更新模型和推断，但大多数半参数方法仍然是批处理的，在大规模流式设置中计算上不切实际

Method: 两阶段学习范式：1) 预热阶段使用全局稳定的在线算法估计有限维参数；2) 最优速率阶段使用正交化得分更新有限维参数，同时通过在线筛方法学习未知链接函数

Result: 方法仅处理最新数据批次，适合数据无法存储的场景，参数轨迹支持在线推断（如置信区域），蒙特卡洛实验在模拟和真实数据上表现良好

Conclusion: 开发了一个适用于半参数单调指标模型的在线学习框架，实现了流数据下的实时参数更新和推断，计算效率高且性能良好

Abstract: Data in modern economic and financial applications often arrive as a stream, requiring models and inference to be updated in real time -- yet most semiparametric methods remain batch-based and computationally impractical in large-scale streaming settings. We develop an online learning framework for semiparametric monotone index models with an unknown monotone link function. Our approach uses a two-phase learning paradigm. In a warm-start phase, we introduce a new online algorithm for the finite-dimensional parameter that is globally stable, yielding consistent estimation from arbitrary initialization. In a subsequent rate-optimal phase, we update the finite-dimensional parameter using an orthogonalized score while learning the unknown link via an online sieve method; this phase achieves optimal convergence rates for both components. The procedure processes only the most recent data batch, making it suitable when data cannot be stored (e.g., memory, privacy, or security constraints), and its resulting parameter trajectories enable online inference such as confidence regions--on parameters including policy-effect analysis with negligible additional computation. Monte Carlo experiments on both simulated and real data show adequate performance especially relative to full sample methods.

</details>


### [99] [Tractable Identification of Strategic Network Formation Models with Unobserved Heterogeneity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08634)
*Wayne Yuan Gao,Ming Li,Zhengyan Xu*

Main category: econ.EM

TL;DR: 提出一种可处理的识别方法，用于具有战略链接相互依赖性和个体不可观测异质性的网络形成模型，通过"bounding-by-c"技术处理内生网络统计量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络形成模型中的关键挑战是内生网络统计量（如共同朋友数量）进入链接形成方程，而模型原语到均衡网络结构的映射通常难以处理，需要开发可处理的识别方法

Method: 采用"bounding-by-c"技术，将内生协变量视为随机变量，利用单调性限制获得识别信息；基于子网络配置推导识别限制系统：完全消除个体固定效应的四元组限制、部分差分固定效应的三元组限制，以及一般加权循环限制

Result: 推导出基于子网络配置的识别限制系统，获得结构参数的点识别结果；初步模拟显示该方法能够提供结构参数的信息边界

Conclusion: 开发了一种可处理的识别方法，用于具有战略相互依赖性和个体异质性的网络形成模型，通过子网络配置的识别限制系统解决了内生性问题，为这类复杂模型提供了实用的识别框架

Abstract: We develop a tractable identification approach for strategic network formation models with both strategic link interdependence and individual unobserved heterogeneity (fixed effects). The key challenge is that endogenous network statistics (e.g. number of common friends) enter the link formation equation, while the mapping from model primitives to equilibrium network structure is generally intractable. Our approach sidesteps this difficulty using a ``bounding-by-$c$'' technique that treats endogenous covariates as random variables and exploits monotonicity restrictions to obtain identifying information. We derive a system of identifying restrictions based on subnetwork configurations: tetrad-based restrictions that completely eliminate all individual fixed effects, triad-based restrictions that partially difference out fixed effects, and general weighted cycle-based restrictions, along with point identification results. Preliminary simulations show that our approach can deliver informative bounds on the structural parameters.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.PM'></div>

# q-fin.PM [[Back]](#toc)

### [100] [Nonconcave Portfolio Choice under Smooth Ambiguity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08552)
*Emanuele Borgonovo,An Chen,Massimo Marinacci,Shihao Zhu*

Main category: q-fin.PM

TL;DR: 本文研究连续时间投资组合选择问题，考虑非线性收益、平滑模糊性和贝叶斯学习，建立了一个动态非凹资产配置框架，通过鲁棒表示实现动态一致性，并将模糊厌恶问题转化为具有扭曲先验的模糊中性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统投资组合理论通常假设收益线性、效用函数凹性，但现实中的委托管理往往涉及非线性激励（如凸性激励），同时投资者面临模型不确定性（模糊性）。需要建立一个更一般的框架来处理非线性收益、模糊厌恶和贝叶斯学习。

Method: 开发了一个动态非凹资产配置的一般框架，通过鲁棒表示将模糊厌恶问题重新表述为具有扭曲先验的模糊中性问题。结合非线性滤波和马氏鞅方法得到显式交易规则，该框架包含了标准凹性和线性收益基准。

Result: 框架能够产生显式交易规则。在委托管理应用中，模糊厌恶使信念向不利状态偏移，限制了原本会触发更激进风险承担的状态范围，并通过降低风险暴露来减少波动性。

Conclusion: 本文建立了一个统一的连续时间投资组合选择框架，能够处理非线性收益、模糊厌恶和贝叶斯学习。该框架具有动态一致性，能够解释模糊厌恶如何影响投资决策，特别是在委托管理情境下，模糊厌恶起到风险约束的作用。

Abstract: We study continuous-time portfolio choice with nonlinear payoffs under smooth ambiguity and Bayesian learning. We develop a general framework for dynamic, non-concave asset allocation that accommodates nonlinear payoffs, broad utility classes, and flexible ambiguity attitudes. Dynamic consistency is obtained by a robust representation that recasts the ambiguity-averse problem as ambiguity-neutral with distorted priors. This structure delivers explicit trading rules by combining nonlinear filtering with the martingale approach and nests standard concave and linear-payoff benchmarks. As a leading application, delegated management with convex incentives illustrates that ambiguity aversion shifts beliefs toward adverse states, limits the range of states that would otherwise trigger more aggressive risk taking, and reduces volatility through lower risky exposure.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.GN'></div>

# q-fin.GN [[Back]](#toc)

### [101] [From debt crises to financial crashes (and back): a stock-flow consistent model for stock price bubbles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07213)
*Matheus R. Grasselli,Adrien Nguyen-Huu*

Main category: q-fin.GN

TL;DR: 该论文开发了一个连续时间的随机宏观金融模型，将Keen经济框架与跳跃扩散驱动的金融市场相结合，研究信贷扩张、崩盘风险与银行利差之间的反馈循环。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究宏观金融系统中的内生金融脆弱性，特别是信贷扩张、资产价格崩溃风险与银行借贷利差之间的相互影响机制，为分析金融不稳定提供数学框架。

Method: 构建连续时间随机宏观金融模型，整合Keen经济框架（包含债务通缩机制和庞氏型金融不稳定）与跳跃扩散价格过程的金融市场，建立经济与金融市场的双向耦合系统。

Result: 在适当参数限制下证明了耦合系统的全局存在性和非爆炸性；数值实验显示不同信贷敏感性和跳跃参数会产生从稳定增长到反复繁荣-萧条周期的多种状态。

Conclusion: 该模型为分析内生金融脆弱性提供了一个数学上严谨且易于处理的宏观金融系统框架，能够捕捉信贷扩张、崩盘风险与银行利差之间的反馈循环。

Abstract: We develop a stochastic macro-financial model in continuous time by integrating two specifications of the Keen economic framework with a financial market driven by a jump-diffusion process. The economic block of the model combines monetary debt-deflation mechanisms with Ponzi-type financial destabilization and is influenced by the financial market through a stochastic interest rate that depends on asset price returns. The financial market block of the model consists of an asset with jump--diffusion price process with endogenous, state-dependent jump intensities driven by speculative credit flows. The model formalizes a feedback loop linking credit expansion, crash risk, perceived return dynamics, and bank lending spreads. Under suitable parameter restrictions, we establish global existence and non-explosion of the coupled system. Numerical experiments illustrate how variations in credit sensitivity and jump parameters generate regimes ranging from stable growth to recurrent boom--bust cycles. The framework provides a tractable setting for analyzing endogenous financial fragility within a mathematically well-posed macro--financial system.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.CP'></div>

# q-fin.CP [[Back]](#toc)

### [102] [Differential Machine Learning for 0DTE Options with Stochastic Volatility and Jumps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07600)
*Takayuki Sakuma*

Main category: q-fin.CP

TL;DR: 提出一种针对0DTE期权的微分机器学习方法，在随机波动率跳跃扩散模型下单次网络评估即可计算价格和希腊字母


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 处理超短期到期期权的定价和风险管理挑战，特别是在随机波动率跳跃扩散模型下，传统方法难以高效计算价格和希腊字母

Method: 采用Black-Scholes形式的价格表示，结合到期期限门控方差修正；使用价格和希腊字母的监督学习与PIDE残差惩罚；引入单独的跳跃算子网络，采用三阶段训练过程

Result: 在Bates模型模拟中，相比单阶段基线方法，该方法改善了跳跃项近似，保持价格误差接近单阶段替代方案的同时提高了希腊字母精度，产生稳定的一日delta对冲，且比基于傅里叶的定价基准快得多

Conclusion: 该方法为0DTE期权提供了一种高效准确的定价和风险管理解决方案，特别适合随机波动率跳跃扩散模型下的超短期期权

Abstract: We present a differential machine learning method for zero-days-to-expiry (0DTE) options under a stochastic-volatility jump-diffusion model that computes prices and Greeks in a single network evaluation. To handle the ultra-short-maturity regime, we represent the price in Black--Scholes form with a maturity-gated variance correction, and combine supervision on prices and Greeks with a PIDE-residual penalty. To make the jump contribution identifiable, we introduce a separate jump-operator network and train it with a three-stage procedure. In Bates-model simulations, the method improves jump-term approximation relative to one-stage baselines, keeps price errors close to one-stage alternatives while improving Greeks accuracy, produces stable one-day delta hedges, and is substantially faster than a Fourier-based pricing benchmark.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [103] [CREDO: Epistemic-Aware Conformalized Credal Envelopes for Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06826)
*Luben M. C. Cabezas,Sabina J. Sloman,Bruno M. Resende,Fanyi Wu,Michele Caprio,Rafael Izbicki*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: CREDO是一种结合可信集方法和保形预测的新方法，通过"先可信后保形"的流程，在保证边际覆盖的同时提供可解释的预测区间分解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统保形预测能提供分布无关的覆盖保证，但在模型外推区域可能显得过于自信，因为它不显式表示认知不确定性；而可信集方法虽然能显示认知效应，但缺乏校准保证。需要结合两者优点。

Method: CREDO采用"先可信后保形"的两步法：1) 构建可解释的可信包络，在局部证据弱时加宽；2) 在此基础上应用分割保形校准，无需额外假设即可保证边际覆盖。

Result: CREDO在基准回归任务中保持目标覆盖率的同时，提高了稀疏自适应性，且计算效率具有竞争力。预测区间宽度可分解为：随机噪声、认知膨胀和分布无关的校准松弛。

Conclusion: CREDO成功结合了保形预测的校准保证和可信集方法的认知不确定性表示，提供了可解释的预测区间，在覆盖率和自适应性方面都有良好表现。

Abstract: Conformal prediction delivers prediction intervals with distribution-free coverage, but its intervals can look overconfident in regions where the model is extrapolating, because standard conformal scores do not explicitly represent epistemic uncertainty. Credal methods, by contrast, make epistemic effects visible by working with sets of plausible predictive distributions, but they are typically model-based and lack calibration guarantees. We introduce CREDO, a simple "credal-then-conformalize" recipe that combines both strengths. CREDO first builds an interpretable credal envelope that widens when local evidence is weak, then applies split conformal calibration on top of this envelope to guarantee marginal coverage without further assumptions. This separation of roles yields prediction intervals that are interpretable: their width can be decomposed into aleatoric noise, epistemic inflation, and a distribution-free calibration slack. We provide a fast implementation based on trimming extreme posterior predictive endpoints, prove validity, and show on benchmark regressions that CREDO maintains target coverage while improving sparsity adaptivity at competitive efficiency.

</details>


### [104] [Bilateral Trade Under Heavy-Tailed Valuations: Minimax Regret with Infinite Variance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06851)
*Hangyi Zhao*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 研究具有有界密度但无限方差的估值下的上下文双边交易，建立了匹配的上下界，刻画了该问题的精确极小极大率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在估值具有有界密度但无限方差的情况下，上下文双边交易问题的学习理论性质。传统分析通常假设估值方差有限，但现实交易中估值可能具有重尾分布，因此需要研究无限方差情况下的遗憾界。

Method: 1. 将Bachoc等人的自约束性质从有界估值扩展到实值估值；2. 结合截断均值估计；3. 使用基于时期的算法；4. 通过Assouad方法和平滑矩匹配构造建立下界。

Result: 当噪声具有p阶矩(p∈(1,2))且市场价值函数为β-Hölder时，基于时期的算法实现了遗憾$\widetilde{O}(T^{1-2β(p-1)/(βp + d(p-1))})$，并通过下界证明这是精确的极小极大率。

Conclusion: 该工作刻画了上下文双边交易在无限方差估值下的精确极小极大率，结果在p=2时的经典非参数率和p→1⁺时的平凡线性率之间插值，为重尾分布下的交易算法提供了理论保证。

Abstract: We study contextual bilateral trade under full feedback when trader valuations have bounded density but infinite variance. We first extend the self-bounding property of Bachoc et al. (ICML 2025) from bounded to real-valued valuations, showing that the expected regret of any price $π$ satisfies $\mathbb{E}[g(m,V,W) - g(π,V,W)] \le L|m-π|^2$ under bounded density alone. Combining this with truncated-mean estimation, we prove that an epoch-based algorithm achieves regret $\widetilde{O}(T^{1-2β(p-1)/(βp + d(p-1))})$ when the noise has finite $p$-th moment for $p \in (1,2)$ and the market value function is $β$-Hölder, and we establish a matching $Ω(\cdot)$ lower bound via Assouad's method with a smoothed moment-matching construction. Our results characterize the exact minimax rate for this problem, interpolating between the classical nonparametric rate at $p=2$ and the trivial linear rate as $p \to 1^+$.

</details>


### [105] [Fairness May Backfire: When Leveling-Down Occurs in Fair Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06901)
*Yi Yang,Xiangyu Chang,Pei-yu Chen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该研究在贝叶斯框架下分析公平性约束对机器学习分类器的影响，发现在属性感知部署中公平性必然改善弱势群体结果，而在属性盲部署中影响取决于数据分布，可能导致"向下拉平"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器学习系统在信贷、就业等关键领域广泛应用，算法公平性成为核心关切。但现有研究不清楚公平性约束何时真正改善受影响群体结果，何时可能导致"向下拉平"（使一个或两个群体都变差）。需要理解不同部署机制下公平性约束的内在影响。

Method: 采用统一的、群体层面的贝叶斯框架分析二元分类中的公平性约束。该方法与分布无关且算法无关，将公平性要求的内在效应与有限样本噪声、训练和干预细节分离。分析两种部署机制：属性感知决策（敏感属性在决策时可用）和属性盲决策（敏感属性被排除在预测之外）。

Result: 在属性感知机制中，公平ML必然（弱）改善弱势群体结果，（弱）恶化优势群体结果。在属性盲机制中，公平性影响取决于数据分布：公平性可能使任一群体受益或受损，甚至可能使两个群体结果同向变化，导致"向上提升"或"向下拉平"。研究识别了这些模式出现的条件，并强调了"被掩盖"候选者在驱动这些模式中的作用。

Conclusion: 研究结果为何时追求算法公平性可能改善群体结果、何时可能导致系统性"向下拉平"提供了结构性指导，为公平ML设计和部署选择提供了信息。不同部署机制对公平性约束的影响存在本质差异，需要在设计公平ML系统时考虑这些差异。

Abstract: As machine learning (ML) systems increasingly shape access to credit, jobs, and other opportunities, the fairness of algorithmic decisions has become a central concern. Yet it remains unclear when enforcing fairness constraints in these systems genuinely improves outcomes for affected groups or instead leads to "leveling down," making one or both groups worse off. We address this question in a unified, population-level (Bayes) framework for binary classification under prevalent group fairness notions. Our Bayes approach is distribution-free and algorithm-agnostic, isolating the intrinsic effect of fairness requirements from finite-sample noise and from training and intervention specifics. We analyze two deployment regimes for ML classifiers under common legal and governance constraints: attribute-aware decision-making (sensitive attributes available at decision time) and attribute-blind decision-making (sensitive attributes excluded from prediction). We show that, in the attribute-aware regime, fair ML necessarily (weakly) improves outcomes for the disadvantaged group and (weakly) worsens outcomes for the advantaged group. In contrast, in the attribute-blind regime, the impact of fairness is distribution-dependent: fairness can benefit or harm either group and may shift both groups' outcomes in the same direction, leading to either leveling up or leveling down. We characterize the conditions under which these patterns arise and highlight the role of "masked" candidates in driving them. Overall, our results provide structural guidance on when pursuing algorithmic fairness is likely to improve group outcomes and when it risks systemic leveling down, informing fair ML design and deployment choices.

</details>


### [106] [Post-Training with Policy Gradients: Optimality and the Base Model Barrier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06957)
*Alireza Mousavi-Hosseini,Murat A. Erdogdu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 研究后训练线性自回归模型，分析结果奖励和过程奖励。证明策略梯度在基础模型有非平凡似然时能达到最小化最优奖励查询次数，但超越基础模型支持集存在指数级查询障碍。过程奖励可避免维度诅咒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究后训练中如何有效利用奖励信号改进模型性能，特别是探索超越基础模型支持集的可能性，分析不同奖励机制（结果奖励 vs 过程奖励）对学习效率和性能的影响。

Method: 使用策略梯度变体进行后训练，分析在γ边界条件下的学习性能。研究两种奖励设置：结果奖励（基于最终输出）和过程奖励（基于token级中间结果）。证明自适应学习率的SGD和PG在统计学习和在线学习中的最优性。

Result: 1. 在基础模型有非平凡似然α时，PG变体能以最小化最优奖励查询次数达到1-ε似然；2. 超越基础模型支持集需要指数级查询，受似然分位数限制；3. 过程奖励通过token级LQ避免维度诅咒；4. 自适应学习率SGD和PG分别达到统计学习和在线学习的近最优性能。

Conclusion: 后训练中超越基础模型支持集存在根本性障碍，结果奖励受指数级查询限制，而过程奖励通过利用token级信息可避免维度诅咒。自适应学习率算法在相应设置下达到最优性能，为后训练设计提供了理论指导。

Abstract: We study post-training linear autoregressive models with outcome and process rewards. Given a context $\boldsymbol{x}$, the model must predict the response $\boldsymbol{y} \in Y^N$, a sequence of length $N$ that satisfies a $γ$ margin condition, an extension of the standard separability to sequences. We prove that on test samples where the base model achieves a non-trivial likelihood $α$, a variant of policy gradient (PG) can achieve likelihood $1 - \varepsilon$ with an essentially minimax optimal number of reward queries $\tilde{O}((α^{-1} + \varepsilon^{-1})/γ^2)$. However, a barrier arises for going beyond the support of the base model. We prove that the overall expected error after post-training with outcome rewards is governed by a property of the base model called the Likelihood Quantile (LQ), and that variants of PG, while minimax optimal, may require a number of reward queries exponential in $N$ to go beyond this support, regardless of the pre-training algorithm. To overcome this barrier, we study post-training with a process reward model, and demonstrate how PG variants in this setting avoid the curse of dimensionality in $N$ via dependence on a token-level LQ. Along the way, we prove that under the margin condition, SGD with adaptive learning rate (LR) achieves a near optimal test error for statistical learning, and PG with adaptive LR achieves a near optimal number of mistakes for online learning while being computationally efficient whenever possible, both of which may be of independent interest.

</details>


### [107] [Generative Adversarial Regression (GAR): Learning Conditional Risk Scenarios](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08553)
*Saeed Asadi,Jonathan Yu-Meng Li*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出Generative Adversarial Regression (GAR)框架，通过生成器学习条件风险场景，使其与下游风险目标对齐，特别适用于可引出函数（如分位数、期望分位数）的风险评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在生成条件风险场景时，往往无法确保生成结果与下游风险目标保持一致。需要一种能够学习条件风险场景的生成框架，使生成器产生的风险分布与真实数据在相同上下文下的风险分布相匹配。

Method: GAR基于可引出函数的回归特性，将点预测扩展到生成建模。采用极小极大化公式：对抗性策略识别风险评估中的最坏情况差异，生成器则适应消除这些差异。通过训练生成器，使其策略诱导的风险与真实数据在相同上下文下的风险相匹配。

Result: 在S&P 500数据上的实验表明，GAR生成的场景比无条件、计量经济学和直接预测基线更好地保持了下游风险，同时在对抗性选择的策略下保持稳定。

Conclusion: GAR提供了一个有效的框架，用于学习与下游风险目标对齐的条件风险场景，特别适用于尾部风险评估，能够生成更准确、更稳健的风险场景。

Abstract: We propose Generative Adversarial Regression (GAR), a framework for learning conditional risk scenarios through generators aligned with downstream risk objectives. GAR builds on a regression characterization of conditional risk for elicitable functionals, including quantiles, expectiles, and jointly elicitable pairs. We extend this principle from point prediction to generative modeling by training generators whose policy-induced risk matches that of real data under the same context. To ensure robustness across all policies, GAR adopts a minimax formulation in which an adversarial policy identifies worst-case discrepancies in risk evaluation while the generator adapts to eliminate them. This structure preserves alignment with the risk functional across a broad class of policies rather than a fixed, pre-specified set. We illustrate GAR through a tail-risk instantiation based on jointly elicitable $(\mathrm{VaR}, \mathrm{ES})$ objectives. Experiments on S\&P 500 data show that GAR produces scenarios that better preserve downstream risk than unconditional, econometric, and direct predictive baselines while remaining stable under adversarially selected policies.

</details>


### [108] [Masked Unfairness: Hiding Causality within Zero ATE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06984)
*Zou Yang,Sophia Xiao,Bijan Mazaheri*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 论文指出基于平均处理效应（ATE）的公平性监管存在"因果掩蔽问题"，优化者可在保持零ATE的同时实现歧视性决策，主张应在模型层面而非决策层面监管公平性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于因果理论的公平性量化框架主要关注平均处理效应（ATE），但仅监管ATE平均值可能掩盖实际的不公平现象。作者关注到基于平均值的监管存在根本性缺陷，需要揭示并解决这一问题。

Method: 将"因果掩蔽问题"表述为线性规划问题，在保持受保护属性与决策之间零ATE的前提下，优化其他目标（如利润最大化或犯罪最小化）。通过研究因果掩蔽的能力和局限性，分析优化过程如何导致不平等。

Result: 研究表明：1）在ATE监管下优化可能导致显著不平等；2）真实公平性与因果掩蔽公平性之间的差异由混杂因素驱动；3）因果掩蔽解决方案在统计和信息论上难以检测，可能长期存在。

Conclusion: 必须在模型层面而非决策层面监管公平性，因为基于ATE的监管存在根本性漏洞。需要完整的条件独立性测试来评估公平性，避免因果掩蔽问题。

Abstract: Recent work has proposed powerful frameworks, rooted in causal theory, to quantify fairness. Causal inference has primarily emphasized the detection of \emph{average} treatment effects (ATEs), and subsequent notions of fairness have inherited this focus. In this paper, we build on previous concerns about regulation based on averages. In particular, we formulate the "causal masking problem" as a linear program that optimizes an alternative objective, such as maximizing profit or minimizing crime, while retaining a zero ATE (i.e., the ATE between a protected attribute and a decision). By studying the capabilities and limitations of causal masking, we show that optimization under ATE-based regulation may induce significant unequal treatment. We demonstrate that the divergence between true and causally masked fairness is driven by confounding, underscoring the importance of full conditional-independence testing when assessing fairness. Finally, we discuss statistical and information-theoretic limitations that make causally masked solutions very difficult to detect, allowing them to persist for long periods. These results argue that we must regulate fairness at the model-level, rather than at the decision level.

</details>


### [109] [Deep Generative Spatiotemporal Engression for Probabilistic Forecasting of Epidemics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07108)
*Rajdeep Pathak,Tanujit Chakraborty*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出深度时空engression方法，用于低频流行病数据的准确可靠概率预测，通过内生不确定性量化优于现有基准模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 流行病预测对公共卫生准备至关重要，但传统时空模型的点预测在不确定性分配上不可靠，需要概率预测来提供最佳/最坏情况场景

Method: 提出深度时空engression方法，作为分布透镜，通过从训练模型中采样生成概率预测；采用轻量级深度生成架构，通过前置加性噪声组件内生量化不确定性

Result: 在六个流行病数据集和三个预测时间范围上的综合评估表明，该方法在点预测和概率预测上均优于多个时空基准模型

Conclusion: 深度时空engression方法能够生成准确可靠的流行病概率预测，并通过可解释性分析增强公共卫生干预的实用性

Abstract: Accurate and reliable forecasting of epidemic incidences is critical for public health preparedness, yet it remains a challenging task due to complex nonlinear temporal dependencies and heterogeneous spatial interactions. Often, point forecasts generated by spatiotemporal models are unreliable in assigning uncertainty to future epidemic events. Probabilistic forecasting of epidemics is therefore crucial for providing the best or worst-case scenarios rather than a simple, often inaccurate, point estimate. We present deep spatiotemporal engression methods to generate accurate and reliable probabilistic forecasts on low-frequency epidemic datasets. The proposed methods act as distributional lenses, and out-of-sample probabilistic forecasts are generated by sampling from the trained models. Our frameworks encapsulate lightweight deep generative architectures, wherein uncertainty is quantified endogenously, driven by a pre-additive noise component during model construction. We establish geometric ergodicity and asymptotic stationarity of the spatiotemporal engression processes under mild assumptions on the network weights and pre-additive noise process. Comprehensive evaluations across six epidemiological datasets over three forecast horizons demonstrate that the proposal consistently outperforms several temporal and spatiotemporal benchmarks in both point and probabilistic forecasting. Additionally, we explore the explainability of the proposal to enhance the models' practical application for informed, timely public health interventions.

</details>


### [110] [Probabilistic Inference and Learning with Stein's Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07467)
*Qiang Liu,Lester Mackey,Chris Oates*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该专著系统介绍了基于Stein方法的概率推断与学习的理论与方法，包括Stein差异的构建、性质分析及其与Stein变分梯度下降的联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为概率推断和机器学习领域提供Stein方法的严格理论框架和方法论基础，填补该领域系统化理论研究的空白。

Method: 从Stein算子和Stein集构建Stein差异，分析其可计算性、分离性、收敛检测和控制等性质，并详细阐述Stein算子与Stein变分梯度下降的联系。

Result: 提供了完整的Stein方法理论体系，包括主要定义和结果的精确陈述，以及所有证明的参考文献，形成了系统化的方法论框架。

Conclusion: 该专著为基于Stein方法的概率推断和学习建立了坚实的理论基础，为相关研究和应用提供了系统化的理论指导和方法工具。

Abstract: This monograph provides a rigorous overview of theoretical and methodological aspects of probabilistic inference and learning with Stein's method. Recipes are provided for constructing Stein discrepancies from Stein operators and Stein sets, and properties of these discrepancies such as computability, separation, convergence detection, and convergence control are discussed. Further, the connection between Stein operators and Stein variational gradient descent is set out in detail. The main definitions and results are precisely stated, and references to all proofs are provided.

</details>


### [111] [Beyond Data Splitting: Full-Data Conformal Prediction by Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07522)
*Young Hyun Cho,Jordan Awan*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出无需数据分割的全数据隐私保护共形预测框架，利用差分隐私的稳定性控制样本内外分数差距，结合保守的隐私分位数算法防止覆盖率不足


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 隐私保护和不确定性量化在数据驱动决策中日益重要。现有隐私共形预测方法通常依赖数据分割，这会减少有效样本量，影响预测性能

Method: 提出全数据隐私保护共形预测框架，避免数据分割。利用差分隐私的稳定性控制样本内外共形分数的差距，配合保守的隐私分位数算法防止覆盖率不足

Result: 通用差分隐私保证提供覆盖率下限，但通常无法恢复名义水平1-α。通过机制特定的稳定性分析，能够渐进恢复名义水平。实验显示比基于分割的隐私基线方法产生更锐利的预测集

Conclusion: 提出的全数据隐私保护共形预测框架避免了数据分割，利用差分隐私的稳定性特性，能够提供更好的预测性能，同时保证隐私保护

Abstract: Privacy protection and uncertainty quantification are increasingly important in data-driven decision making. Conformal prediction provides finite-sample marginal coverage, but existing private approaches often rely on data splitting, reducing the effective sample size. We propose a full-data privacy-preserving conformal prediction framework that avoids splitting. Our framework leverages stability induced by differential privacy to control the gap between in-sample and out-of-sample conformal scores, and pairs this with a conservative private quantile routine designed to prevent under-coverage. We show that a generic differential privacy guarantee yields a universal coverage floor, yet cannot generally recover the nominal $1-α$ level. We then provide a refined, mechanism-specific stability analysis and yields asymptotic recovery of the nominal level. Experiments demonstrate sharper prediction sets than the split-based private baseline.

</details>


### [112] [An Interpretable Generative Framework for Anomaly Detection in High-Dimensional Financial Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07864)
*Waldyn G Martinez*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: ReGEN-TAD：一个可解释的生成框架，结合机器学习和计量经济学诊断，用于高维金融时间序列的结构不稳定性和异常检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维金融时间序列具有复杂的时间依赖性和演变的横截面结构，检测其中的结构不稳定性和异常具有挑战性。需要结合现代机器学习与计量经济学诊断方法。

Method: 提出ReGEN-TAD框架，结合联合预测和重构，采用改进的卷积-Transformer架构。聚合预测不一致性、重构退化、潜在失真和波动率变化等互补信号，通过稳健校准得到统一的异常分数。

Result: 在合成数据和金融面板上的实验表明，该方法对结构化偏差具有更好的鲁棒性，同时能够实现经济上一致的因素级归因。

Conclusion: ReGEN-TAD是一个有效的无监督异常检测框架，结合了机器学习和计量经济学的优势，为高维金融时间序列分析提供了可解释的解决方案。

Abstract: Detecting structural instability and anomalies in high-dimensional financial time series is challenging due to complex temporal dependence and evolving cross-sectional structure. We propose ReGEN-TAD, an interpretable generative framework that integrates modern machine learning with econometric diagnostics for anomaly detection. The model combines joint forecasting and reconstruction within a refined convolutional--transformer architecture and aggregates complementary signals capturing predictive inconsistency, reconstruction degradation, latent distortion, and volatility shifts. Robust calibration yields a unified anomaly score without labeled data. Experiments on synthetic and financial panels demonstrate improved robustness to structured deviations while enabling economically coherent factor-level attribution.

</details>


### [113] [Robust Transfer Learning with Side Information](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07921)
*Akram S. Awad,Shihab Ahmed,Yue Wang,George K. Atia*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一种基于估计中心不确定性集的鲁棒MDP框架，利用有限目标域样本和源-目标动态的边信息（特征矩、分布距离、密度比）构建更紧的不确定性集，减少环境转移时的保守性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分布鲁棒优化在处理大环境转移时需要扩大不确定性集，导致策略过于保守和悲观。需要一种方法能利用有限目标域样本和源-目标动态的边信息来构建更精确的不确定性集

Method: 通过约束估计方法构建估计中心不确定性集，整合有限目标样本和边信息（特征矩边界、分布距离、密度比）来改进转移核估计。建立误差界和收敛性理论，分析鲁棒次优性差距

Result: 在OpenAI Gym环境和经典控制问题上验证，相比现有鲁棒和非鲁棒基线方法，在目标域性能上表现更优。当转移模型具有低维结构时，边信息能减少鲁棒次优性差距并提高样本效率

Conclusion: 提出的估计中心不确定性集框架能有效利用边信息构建更紧的不确定性集，减少环境转移时的保守性，在有限样本下获得更好的目标域性能，为鲁棒MDP提供了更实用的解决方案

Abstract: Robust Markov Decision Processes (MDPs) address environmental shift through distributionally robust optimization (DRO) by finding an optimal worst-case policy within an uncertainty set of transition kernels. However, standard DRO approaches require enlarging the uncertainty set under large shifts, which leads to overly conservative and pessimistic policies.
  In this paper, we propose a framework for transfer under environment shift that derives a robust target-domain policy via estimate-centered uncertainty sets, constructed through constrained estimation that integrates limited target samples with side information about the source-target dynamics. The side information includes bounds on feature moments, distributional distances, and density ratios, yielding improved kernel estimates and tighter uncertainty sets.
  The side information includes bounds on feature moments, distributional distances, and density ratios, yielding improved kernel estimates and tighter uncertainty sets.
  Error bounds and convergence results are established for both robust and non-robust value functions. Moreover, we provide a finite-sample guarantee on the learned robust policy and analyze the robust sub-optimality gap. Under mild low-dimensional structure on the transition model, the side information reduces this gap and improves sample efficiency. We assess the performance of our approach across OpenAI Gym environments and classic control problems, consistently demonstrating superior target-domain performance over state-of-the-art robust and non-robust baselines.

</details>


### [114] [Local Constrained Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07965)
*Jing Jingzhe,Fan Zheyi,Szu Hui Ng,Qingpei Hu*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出LCBO框架解决高维约束贝叶斯优化问题，通过交替局部下降和探索，实现多项式维度依赖的收敛速度，在100维基准测试中优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维约束贝叶斯优化面临维度灾难挑战，传统信任域方法在遇到紧约束或复杂约束时容易过早收缩，需要新的解决方案。

Method: 提出局部约束贝叶斯优化(LCBO)框架，利用约束惩罚代理模型的可微分特性，交替进行快速局部下降和不确定性驱动的探索。

Result: 理论上证明LCBO在常见核函数下对KKT残差实现多项式维度依赖的收敛速度；实验上在高达100维的基准测试中一致优于现有最优方法。

Conclusion: LCBO为高维约束贝叶斯优化提供了有效的解决方案，克服了传统方法的局限性，实现了更好的理论和实际性能。

Abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) for high-dimensional constrained problems remains a significant challenge due to the curse of dimensionality. We propose Local Constrained Bayesian Optimization (LCBO), a novel framework tailored for such settings. Unlike trust-region methods that are prone to premature shrinking when confronting tight or complex constraints, LCBO leverages the differentiable landscape of constraint-penalized surrogates to alternate between rapid local descent and uncertainty-driven exploration. Theoretically, we prove that LCBO achieves a convergence rate for the Karush-Kuhn-Tucker (KKT) residual that depends polynomially on the dimension $d$ for common kernels under mild assumptions, offering a rigorous alternative to global BO where regret bounds typically scale exponentially. Extensive evaluations on high-dimensional benchmarks (up to 100D) demonstrate that LCBO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [115] [Beyond ReinMax: Low-Variance Gradient Estimators for Discrete Latent Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08257)
*Daniel Wang,Thang D. Bui*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出ReinMax-Rao和ReinMax-CV两种梯度估计器，通过Rao-Blackwellisation和控制变量技术降低ReinMax的方差，在离散隐变量VAE训练中表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的Straight-Through家族梯度估计器ReinMax虽然通过Heun方法减少了偏差，但方差较高，需要改进以提升离散隐变量模型的训练效果

Method: 将Rao-Blackwellisation和控制变量技术整合到ReinMax中，形成ReinMax-Rao和ReinMax-CV两种新估计器；同时从数值积分角度重新审视ReinMax

Result: 新估计器在训练离散隐变量变分自编码器时表现出优越性能，有效降低了方差；提供了ReinMax的数值积分视角解释

Conclusion: 通过结合方差缩减技术改进ReinMax，显著提升了离散隐变量模型的训练效果，为梯度估计器设计提供了新思路

Abstract: Machine learning models involving discrete latent variables require gradient estimators to facilitate backpropagation in a computationally efficient manner. The most recent addition to the Straight-Through family of estimators, ReinMax, can be viewed from a numerical ODE perspective as incorporating an approximation via Heun's method to reduce bias, but at the cost of high variance. In this work, we introduce the ReinMax-Rao and ReinMax-CV estimators which incorporate Rao-Blackwellisation and control variate techniques into ReinMax to reduce its variance. Our estimators demonstrate superior performance on training variational autoencoders with discrete latent spaces. Furthermore, we investigate the possibility of leveraging alternative numerical methods for constructing more accurate gradient approximations and present an alternative view of ReinMax from a simpler numerical integration perspective.

</details>


### [116] [Posterior Sampling Reinforcement Learning with Gaussian Processes for Continuous Control: Sublinear Regret Bounds for Unbounded State Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08287)
*Hamish Flynn,Joe Watson,Ingmar Posner,Jan Peters*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文分析了高斯过程后验采样强化学习(GP-PSRL)的贝叶斯遗憾，通过新的理论方法解决了先前工作中对最大信息增益依赖不紧和未正确处理无界状态空间的问题，得到了阶数为$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^{3/2}\sqrt{γ_{T/H} T})$的贝叶斯遗憾上界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 后验采样是一种在不确定性下决策的有效启发式方法，已成功应用于各种连续控制问题。然而，GP-PSRL的理论研究有限，现有遗憾界限要么未能实现对核相关量（最大信息增益）的紧依赖，要么未能正确处理系统状态空间无界的事实。

Method: 通过递归应用Borell-Tsirelson-Ibragimov-Sudakov不等式，证明算法实际访问的状态以高概率包含在近常数半径的球内。使用链式方法控制GP-PSRL的遗憾，以获得对最大信息增益的紧依赖。

Result: 得到了阶数为$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^{3/2}\sqrt{γ_{T/H} T})$的贝叶斯遗憾上界，其中$H$是时间步长，$T$是时间步数，$γ_{T/H}$是最大信息增益。

Conclusion: 该研究解决了先前PSRL理论工作的局限性，为在复杂设置中分析PSRL提供了理论基础和工具。

Abstract: We analyze the Bayesian regret of the Gaussian process posterior sampling reinforcement learning (GP-PSRL) algorithm. Posterior sampling is an effective heuristic for decision-making under uncertainty that has been used to develop successful algorithms for a variety of continuous control problems. However, theoretical work on GP-PSRL is limited. All known regret bounds either fail to achieve a tight dependence on a kernel-dependent quantity called the maximum information gain or fail to properly account for the fact that the set of possible system states is unbounded. Through a recursive application of the Borell-Tsirelson-Ibragimov-Sudakov inequality, we show that, with high probability, the states actually visited by the algorithm are contained within a ball of near-constant radius. To obtain tight dependence on the maximum information gain, we use the chaining method to control the regret suffered by GP-PSRL. Our main result is a Bayesian regret bound of the order $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(H^{3/2}\sqrt{γ_{T/H} T})$, where $H$ is the horizon, $T$ is the number of time steps and $γ_{T/H}$ is the maximum information gain. With this result, we resolve the limitations with prior theoretical work on PSRL, and provide the theoretical foundation and tools for analyzing PSRL in complex settings.

</details>


### [117] [Unifying On- and Off-Policy Variance Reduction Methods](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08370)
*Olivier Jeunen*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 本文建立了在线A/B测试与离策略评估之间的正式等价关系，证明标准在线差异均值估计器在数学上等同于配备最优控制变量的逆倾向评分估计器，并将回归调整方法与双重稳健估计统一起来。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线A/B测试和离策略评估虽然共享估计处理增量价值的目标，但通常独立运作，使用不同的术语和统计工具。这种分离阻碍了知识交流和最佳实践的共享。

Method: 通过建立正式数学等价关系，证明标准在线差异均值估计器等同于配备最优（方差最小化）加性控制变量的逆倾向评分估计器。进一步将回归调整方法（如CUPED、CUPAC、ML-RATE）与双重稳健估计统一起来。

Result: 建立了在线A/B测试与离策略评估之间的正式等价关系，揭示了两种领域核心方差减少方法在数学结构上的一致性，为两个领域提供了统一的理论框架。

Conclusion: 这种统一视角扩展了对常用方法的理解，能够指导在线实验和离策略评估领域的研究者和从业者，促进两个领域之间的知识交流和最佳实践共享。

Abstract: Continuous and efficient experimentation is key to the practical success of user-facing applications on the web, both through online A/B-tests and off-policy evaluation. Despite their shared objective -- estimating the incremental value of a treatment -- these domains often operate in isolation, utilising distinct terminologies and statistical toolkits. This paper bridges that divide by establishing a formal equivalence between their canonical variance reduction methods.
  We prove that the standard online Difference-in-Means estimator is mathematically identical to an off-policy Inverse Propensity Scoring estimator equipped with an optimal (variance-minimising) additive control variate. Extending this unification, we demonstrate that widespread regression adjustment methods (such as CUPED, CUPAC, and ML-RATE) are structurally equivalent to Doubly Robust estimation. This unified view extends our understanding of commonly used approaches, and can guide practitioners and researchers working on either class of problems.

</details>


### [118] [Momentum SVGD-EM for Accelerated Maximum Marginal Likelihood Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08676)
*Adam Rozzio,Rafael Athanasiades,O. Deniz Akyildiz*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出Momentum SVGD-EM方法，在SVGD-EM中引入Nesterov加速，在参数更新和概率测度空间同时加速，显著提升收敛速度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于SVGD的MMLE方法虽然有效，但收敛速度仍有提升空间。从最大边际似然估计的自由能泛函优化视角出发，期望最大化算法可视为在参数和概率测度联合空间上的坐标下降，这为加速算法提供了理论基础

Method: 在Stein变分梯度下降-期望最大化(SVGD-EM)框架中引入Nesterov动量加速机制，同时在模型参数更新和概率测度空间优化中应用动量加速，形成Momentum SVGD-EM算法

Result: Momentum SVGD-EM在各种难度递增的任务中均能一致加速收敛，在低维和高维设置下都表现出有效性，显著减少所需迭代次数

Conclusion: 通过将Nesterov加速机制同时应用于参数空间和概率测度空间，提出的Momentum SVGD-EM方法能够有效加速基于SVGD的最大边际似然估计算法，为复杂统计推断问题提供了更高效的解决方案

Abstract: Maximum marginal likelihood estimation (MMLE) can be formulated as the optimization of a free energy functional. From this viewpoint, the Expectation-Maximisation (EM) algorithm admits a natural interpretation as a coordinate descent method over the joint space of model parameters and probability measures. Recently, a significant body of work has adopted this perspective, leading to interacting particle algorithms for MMLE. In this paper, we propose an accelerated version of one such procedure, based on Stein variational gradient descent (SVGD), by introducing Nesterov acceleration in both the parameter updates and in the space of probability measures. The resulting method, termed Momentum SVGD-EM, consistently accelerates convergence in terms of required iterations across various tasks of increasing difficulty, demonstrating effectiveness in both low- and high-dimensional settings.

</details>


### [119] [Structural Causal Bottleneck Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08682)
*Simon Bing,Jonas Wahl,Jakob Runge*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出结构因果瓶颈模型（SCBMs），假设高维变量间的因果效应仅依赖于低维摘要统计量（瓶颈），提供任务特定的降维框架，可通过标准算法估计


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果降维方法如因果表示学习或因果抽象学习存在局限性，需要一种更灵活的任务特定降维框架，同时保持因果效应的可识别性和可估计性

Method: 引入结构因果瓶颈模型（SCBMs），假设因果效应仅依赖于低维瓶颈统计量，提供灵活的降维框架，可通过标准简单学习算法进行估计

Result: 分析了SCBMs的可识别性，将其与Tishby & Zaslavsky的信息瓶颈联系起来，实验展示了如何估计SCBMs，并证明瓶颈在低样本迁移学习中对效应估计的益处

Conclusion: SCBMs为现有因果降维框架提供了有前景的替代方案，结合了任务特定降维的灵活性和因果效应的可识别性，在低样本迁移学习中具有实际优势

Abstract: We introduce structural causal bottleneck models (SCBMs), a novel class of structural causal models. At the core of SCBMs lies the assumption that causal effects between high-dimensional variables only depend on low-dimensional summary statistics, or bottlenecks, of the causes. SCBMs provide a flexible framework for task-specific dimension reduction while being estimable via standard, simple learning algorithms in practice. We analyse identifiability in SCBMs, connect them to information bottlenecks in the sense of Tishby & Zaslavsky (2015), and illustrate how to estimate them experimentally. We also demonstrate the benefit of bottlenecks for effect estimation in low-sample transfer learning settings. We argue that SCBMs provide an alternative to existing causal dimension reduction frameworks like causal representation learning or causal abstraction learning.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [120] [Evaluating AI-Enabled deception vulnerability amongst Sub-Saharan-Africa migrants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06598)
*Deborah Oluwasanya*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 研究评估撒哈拉以南非洲移民对AI欺骗的脆弱性，发现先前被针对性攻击是最强风险指标，而AI内容识别能力和高验证努力是重要保护因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估撒哈拉以南非洲移民对AI欺骗（特别是针对他们的诈骗）的脆弱性，探索区分人类与AI生成内容的能力如何影响对AI欺骗的易感性。

Method: 对31名欧洲和北美的SSA专业人士和移民进行问卷调查，涵盖人口统计与跨国背景、核心AI素养与脆弱性、缓解措施与信任等主题，使用混合结构方程模型和多元线性回归分析数据。

Result: AI欺骗脆弱性的最强指标是先前被针对性攻击；识别AI内容的能力和高验证努力行为是显著的保护因素；跨国背景因素（如海外停留时间或国际汇款）影响很小且不显著。

Conclusion: 针对撒哈拉以南非洲移民的AI欺骗脆弱性主要受先前被攻击经历影响，提高AI内容识别能力和促进高验证努力行为可以有效降低脆弱性，而跨国背景因素影响有限。

Abstract: In this study, the vulnerability of Sub-Saharan African migrants to AI-enabled deception, specifically the risk of exposure to scams targeting them, was evaluated. I hypothesized that the ability to distinguish human-generated content from AI-generated content had far-reaching implications beyond content assessment to determining vulnerability to AI-enabled deception. Data collected from a survey of 31 professionals and migrants from SSA across Europe and North America, covering themes on Demographics and Transnational Context, Core AI Literacy and Vulnerability, Mitigation and Trust, was modelled using a hybrid Structural Equation Model and Multiple Linear Regression. The results indicated that the strongest indicator of vulnerability to AI-enabled deception, such as scam, was prior exposure to targeting, as targeting has previously been noted to be, in most cases, a calculated attempt. Confidence in the ability to identify AI content as well as the behavioral characteristics of high verification effort, emerged as significant protective factors that could lower the vulnerability to AI enabled deception. Other transnational contexts such as duration spent abroad or engaging in international fund remittance were found to have a small and insignificant effect on vulnerability.

</details>


### [121] [Building the ethical AI framework of the future: from philosophy to practice](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06599)
*Jasper Kyle Catapang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 提出一种AI伦理控制架构，通过三重门机制（指标门、治理门、生态门）在AI生命周期各阶段嵌入伦理约束，将规范承诺转化为可执行、可测试的控制措施。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI治理工具（如欧盟AI法案、IEEE 7000系列、NIST AI风险管理框架）提供高层指导但缺乏可执行的端到端操作控制，特别是随着多模态和代理系统的出现，AI管道中的伦理风险加剧。

Method: 设计伦理设计控制架构，在AI生命周期各阶段嵌入结果主义、义务论和美德伦理推理，实施三重门结构：指标门（定量性能和安全阈值）、治理门（法律、权利和程序合规）、生态门（碳和水预算及可持续性约束），并定义可测量的触发条件、升级路径、审计工件以及与现有MLOps和CI/CD管道的集成。
