This decoupling enables hybrid networks that optimize the trade-off between expressiveness and computational cost. Unlike standard formulations, DFKAN supports diverse basis function families, including orthogonal polynomials, B-splines, and radial basis functions, integrated with configurable regularization strategies that stabilize training dynamics. Comprehensive evaluations across regression benchmarks, physics-informed tasks, and function approximation demonstrate that DFKAN outperforms both MLPs and conventional KANs in accuracy, convergence speed, and gradient fidelity. The proposed hybrid configurations achieve superior performance with one to two orders of magnitude fewer parameters than standard KANs, effectively mitigating the parameter explosion problem while preserving KAN-style expressiveness. DFKAN provides a principled, scalable framework for incorporating adaptive non-linearities, proving particularly advantageous for data-efficient learning and interpretable function discovery in scientific applications.

</details>


### [464] [Integral Formulas for Vector Spherical Tensor Products](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08630)
*Valentin Heyraud,Zachary Weller-Davies,Jules Tilly*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文推导了向量球张量积的简化积分公式，获得了反对称Gaunt系数的闭式表达式，使Clebsch-Gordan张量积的模拟计算量减少9倍，为SO(3)-等变神经网络应用提供了高效实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Xie等人最近提出的向量球张量积将Gaunt张量积推广到反对称耦合，但缺乏高效的实现方法。论文旨在简化这一张量积的计算，使其在SO(3)-等变神经网络中更实用。

Method: 推导积分公式简化向量球张量积，获得反对称Gaunt系数的显式闭式表达式，通过单一向量球张量积模拟Clebsch-Gordan张量积，并研究张量积归一化的低秩分解。

Result: 获得了反对称Gaunt系数的闭式表达式，将Clebsch-Gordan张量积的模拟计算量减少9倍，实现了向量球张量积的高效实现，并分析了表达力-运行时权衡。

Conclusion: 该工作为向量球张量积提供了高效实现方法，使其在SO(3)-等变神经网络中更实用，同时通过控制表达力-运行时权衡为神经网络设计提供了灵活性。

Abstract: We derive integral formulas that simplify the Vector Spherical Tensor Product recently introduced by Xie et al., which generalizes the Gaunt tensor product to antisymmetric couplings. In particular, we obtain explicit closed-form expressions for the antisymmetric analogues of the Gaunt coefficients. This enables us to simulate the Clebsch-Gordan tensor product using a single Vector Spherical Tensor Product, yielding a $9\times$ reduction in the required tensor product evaluations. Our results enable efficient and practical implementations of the Vector Spherical Tensor Product, paving the way for applications of this generalization of Gaunt tensor products in $\mathrm{SO}(3)$-equivariant neural networks. Moreover, we discuss how the Gaunt and the Vector Spherical Tensor Products allow to control the expressivity-runtime tradeoff associated with the usual Clebsch-Gordan Tensor Products. Finally, we investigate low rank decompositions of the normalizations of the considered tensor products in view of their use in equivariant neural networks.

</details>


### [465] [Grow, Don't Overwrite: Fine-tuning Without Forgetting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08647)
*Dyah Adila,Hanna Mazzawi,Benoit Dherin,Xavier Gonzalvo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种函数保持的扩展方法，通过复制预训练参数并应用缩放校正，在初始化时保持数学等价性，从而解决灾难性遗忘问题，平衡可塑性与稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练模型适应特定任务时常导致灾难性遗忘，现有方法要么在新任务上性能妥协，要么难以平衡训练稳定性与预训练知识的高效重用。

Method: 函数保持扩展方法：在Transformer子模块中复制预训练参数，应用缩放校正保证扩展模型在初始化时与原始模型数学等价，实现稳定训练并充分利用现有知识。

Result: 消除可塑性与稳定性之间的权衡，在下游任务上达到全微调性能，且不降低模型原始能力；通过选择性扩展少量层，能以极低计算成本达到全微调相同性能。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了灾难性遗忘问题，实现了预训练知识的高效重用与任务适应的平衡，具有模块化优势，显著降低计算成本。

Abstract: Adapting pre-trained models to specialized tasks often leads to catastrophic forgetting, where new knowledge overwrites foundational capabilities. Existing methods either compromise performance on the new task or struggle to balance training stability with efficient reuse of pre-trained knowledge. We introduce a novel function-preserving expansion method that resolves this dilemma. Our technique expands model capacity by replicating pre-trained parameters within transformer submodules and applying a scaling correction that guarantees the expanded model is mathematically identical to the original at initialization, enabling stable training while exploiting existing knowledge. Empirically, our method eliminates the trade-off between plasticity and stability, matching the performance of full fine-tuning on downstream tasks without any degradation of the model's original capabilities. Furthermore, we demonstrate the modularity of our approach, showing that by selectively expanding a small subset of layers we can achieve the same performance as full fine-tuning at a fraction of the computational cost.

</details>


### [466] [Divide and Predict: An Architecture for Input Space Partitioning and Enhanced Accuracy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08649)
*Fenix W. Huang,Henning S. Mortveit,Christian M. Reidys*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于训练数据点对影响方差的内在异质性度量，用于评估数据是否为混合分布，并通过数据净化提升测试准确率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化监督学习中训练数据的异质性，识别数据是否为多个分布的混合，以改善模型性能

Method: 开发基于训练点对影响方差的异质性度量，证明数据本身包含支持分块的关键信息，提出基于方差的数据净化方法

Result: 方差能有效捕捉数据异质性，在等比例混合分布时方差最大，基于方差的数据净化结合分块训练能显著提升测试准确率

Conclusion: 提出的内在异质性度量能有效识别混合分布数据，数据净化后分块训练可显著提高模型性能

Abstract: In this article the authors develop an intrinsic measure for quantifying heterogeneity in training data for supervised learning. This measure is the variance of a random variable which factors through the influences of pairs of training points. The variance is shown to capture data heterogeneity and can thus be used to assess if a sample is a mixture of distributions. The authors prove that the data itself contains key information that supports a partitioning into blocks. Several proof of concept studies are provided that quantify the connection between variance and heterogeneity for EMNIST image data and synthetic data. The authors establish that variance is maximal for equal mixes of distributions, and detail how variance-based data purification followed by conventional training over blocks can lead to significant increases in test accuracy.

</details>


### [467] [Group Entropies and Mirror Duality: A Class of Flexible Mirror Descent Updates for Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08651)
*Andrzej Cichocki,Piergiulio Tempesta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个连接形式群论与群熵的机器学习框架，为Mirror Descent优化算法提供无限灵活的参数化家族，通过群理论镜像映射实现高度可适应的优化更新。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Mirror Descent算法中的镜像映射选择有限，缺乏灵活性。作者希望利用群熵的丰富数学结构，构建一个能够适应不同数据几何和统计分布的无限参数化优化算法家族。

Method: 1. 利用群熵理论构建广义熵函数，涵盖Shannon、Tsallis、Kaniadakis等熵族；2. 通过群理论镜像映射（多参数广义对数及其逆）实现MD更新；3. 引入"镜像对偶性"概念，允许在镜像函数与其逆函数之间切换；4. 通过调整或学习群对数的超参数来适应训练分布的统计特性。

Result: 在大规模单纯形约束二次规划问题上进行了广泛评估，验证了所提更新的有效性、鲁棒性和性能。该方法提供了更大的灵活性、改进的收敛特性，并为正则化器和自然梯度算法的设计开辟了新视角。

Conclusion: 该框架成功地将形式群论和群熵与机器学习相结合，为Mirror Descent优化算法创建了一个无限灵活的参数化家族，能够适应不同的数据几何和统计分布，为机器学习和深度学习应用提供了新的设计可能性。

Abstract: We introduce a comprehensive theoretical and algorithmic framework that bridges formal group theory and group entropies with modern machine learning, paving the way for an infinite, flexible family of Mirror Descent (MD) optimization algorithms. Our approach exploits the rich structure of group entropies, which are generalized entropic functionals governed by group composition laws, encompassing and significantly extending all trace-form entropies such as the Shannon, Tsallis, and Kaniadakis families. By leveraging group-theoretical mirror maps (or link functions) in MD, expressed via multi-parametric generalized logarithms and their inverses (group exponentials), we achieve highly flexible and adaptable MD updates that can be tailored to diverse data geometries and statistical distributions. To this end, we introduce the notion of \textit{mirror duality}, which allows us to seamlessly switch or interchange group-theoretical link functions with their inverses, subject to specific learning rate constraints. By tuning or learning the hyperparameters of the group logarithms enables us to adapt the model to the statistical properties of the training distribution, while simultaneously ensuring desirable convergence characteristics via fine-tuning. This generality not only provides greater flexibility and improved convergence properties, but also opens new perspectives for applications in machine learning and deep learning by expanding the design of regularizers and natural gradient algorithms. We extensively evaluate the validity, robustness, and performance of the proposed updates on large-scale, simplex-constrained quadratic programming problems.

</details>


### [468] [Context-free Self-Conditioned GAN for Trajectory Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08658)
*Tiago Rodrigues de Almeida,Eduardo Gutierrez Maestro,Oscar Martinez Mozos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于自条件GAN的无监督上下文无关方法，从2D轨迹中学习不同行为模式，用于轨迹预测任务


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有轨迹预测方法通常需要上下文信息，本文旨在开发无需上下文信息的无监督方法，通过自条件GAN学习轨迹中的不同行为模式

Method: 基于自条件GAN的无监督框架，在判别器特征空间中识别不同行为移动模式，提出三种不同的自条件GAN训练设置

Result: 在人类运动和道路智能体两个数据集上测试，在代表性最差的监督标签上优于先前上下文无关方法，在人类运动数据集上表现全局最优，在道路智能体数据集上表现良好

Conclusion: 自条件GAN的无监督方法能有效学习轨迹中的行为模式，在轨迹预测任务中表现出色，特别是在缺乏上下文信息的情况下

Abstract: In this paper, we present a context-free unsupervised approach based on a self-conditioned GAN to learn different modes from 2D trajectories. Our intuition is that each mode indicates a different behavioral moving pattern in the discriminator's feature space. We apply this approach to the problem of trajectory forecasting. We present three different training settings based on self-conditioned GAN, which produce better forecasters. We test our method in two data sets: human motion and road agents. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms previous context-free methods in the least representative supervised labels while performing well in the remaining labels. In addition, our approach outperforms globally in human motion, while performing well in road agents.

</details>


### [469] [Impermanent: A Live Benchmark for Temporal Generalization in Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08707)
*Azul Garza,Renée Rosillo,Rodrigo Mendoza-Smith,David Salinas,Andrew Robert Williams,Arjun Ashok,Mononito Goswami,José Martín Juárez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Impermanent是一个用于时间序列预测的实时基准测试平台，通过连续更新的数据流进行顺序预测评估，专注于时间鲁棒性、分布漂移和性能稳定性，而非静态测试集的一次性准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前时间序列预测的预训练基础模型声称具有广泛泛化能力，但现有评估协议证据有限。静态训练-测试分割容易导致数据污染（模型可能在测试数据上训练或使用测试分数进行模型选择），从而夸大性能表现。

Method: 引入Impermanent实时基准测试，在开放世界时间变化下评估预测模型：1) 在连续更新的数据流上按时间顺序评分预测；2) 基于GitHub开源活动实例化，提供自然实时且高度非平稳的数据集；3) 关注star数前400的仓库，从issue、pull request、push事件和新star构建时间序列；4) 使用滚动窗口和每日更新进行评估。

Result: 建立了标准化协议和排行榜，用于可重复、持续的比较。通过将评估重点从静态准确性转向持续性能，为评估时间序列预测中基础级泛化能力何时及是否真正实现提供了具体步骤。

Conclusion: Impermanent通过实时、顺序评估框架，解决了当前时间序列预测基准测试的局限性，为评估模型在真实世界时间变化下的鲁棒性和泛化能力提供了更可靠的评估方法。

Abstract: Recent advances in time-series forecasting increasingly rely on pre-trained foundation-style models. While these models often claim broad generalization, existing evaluation protocols provide limited evidence. Indeed, most current benchmarks use static train-test splits that can easily lead to contamination as foundation models can inadvertently train on test data or perform model selection using test scores, which can inflate performance. We introduce Impermanent, a live benchmark that evaluates forecasting models under open-world temporal change by scoring forecasts sequentially over time on continuously updated data streams, enabling the study of temporal robustness, distributional shift, and performance stability rather than one-off accuracy on a frozen test set. Impermanent is instantiated on GitHub open-source activity, providing a naturally live and highly non-stationary dataset shaped by releases, shifting contributor behavior, platform/tooling changes, and external events. We focus on the top 400 repositories by star count and construct time series from issues opened, pull requests opened, push events, and new stargazers, evaluated over a rolling window with daily updates, alongside standardized protocols and leaderboards for reproducible, ongoing comparison. By shifting evaluation from static accuracy to sustained performance, Impermanent takes a concrete step toward assessing when and whether foundation-level generalization in time-series forecasting can be meaningfully claimed. Code and a live dashboard are available at https://github.com/TimeCopilot/impermanent and https://impermanent.timecopilot.dev.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.MF'></div>

# q-fin.MF [[Back]](#toc)

### [470] [SABR Type Libor (Forward) Market Model (SABR/LMM) with time-dependent skew and smile](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07616)
*Osamu Tsuchiya*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 本文提供了SABR/LMM模型的全面定义和完整实现方法，解决了现有模型在实际银行应用中不够灵活的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 利率衍生品（如可赎回奇异互换）的定价模型需要与SABR波动率曲面相匹配。虽然已有许多SABR/LMM相关研究，但大多数模型在实际全球银行应用中不够灵活，因此需要提供更全面实用的定义和实现方案。

Method: 基于Libor市场模型（LMM）与SABR模型的结合，开发SABR/LMM模型，提供完整的模型定义和详细的实现方法。

Result: 提出了一个全面定义的SABR/LMM模型，并提供了完整的实现描述，使模型能够更灵活地应用于实际银行环境。

Conclusion: 本文填补了SABR/LMM模型在实践应用中的空白，为利率衍生品定价提供了更实用、更灵活的建模框架。

Abstract: Volatility Skew and Smile of Interest Rate products (Swaption and Caplet) are represented by SABR (Stochastic Alpha Beta Rho model). So, the Interest Rate derivatives model for pricing the callable exotic swaps should be comparable to the SABR volatility surface. In the interest rate derivatives models, Libor Market Model (LMM) (in a post-Libor world, Forward Market Model (FMM)) is one of the most popular models used in the market. So, there are many attempts to develop LMMs that are comparable to the SABR surface. It is called SABR/LMM. There are many references for SABR/LMM, but most of them only treat SABR/LMM, which is not flexible enough to be used practically in global banks. The purpose of this paper is to provide a comprehensive definition of SABR/LMM and a complete description of how it is to be implemented.

</details>


### [471] [Understanding the Long-Only Minimum Variance Portfolio](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07692)
*Nick L. Gunther,Alec N. Kercheval,Ololade Sowunmi*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 研究因子模型协方差矩阵下，仅做多全局最小方差组合与资产因子暴露之间的关系，针对单因子模型给出解析解，多因子模型给出几何描述


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探讨因子模型中协方差结构与仅做多约束下最小方差组合的数学关系，为投资组合优化提供理论洞察

Method: 对于单因子模型，推导仅做多全局最小方差组合的解析表达式；对于多因子模型，使用几何方法描述组合解；并用美国股票日收益率数据进行实证验证

Result: 建立了因子暴露与仅做多最小方差组合之间的明确关系，为因子模型下的投资组合构建提供了理论框架

Conclusion: 因子模型协方差结构直接影响仅做多约束下的最优投资组合，单因子模型可得到解析解，多因子模型可用几何方法描述，实证结果验证了理论分析

Abstract: For a covariance matrix coming from a factor model of returns, we investigate the relationship between the long-only global minimum variance portfolio and the asset exposures to the factors. In the case of a 1-factor model, we provide a rigorous and explicit description of the long-only solution in terms of the parameters of the covariance matrix. For $q>1$ factors, we provide a description of the long-only portfolio in geometric terms. The results are illustrated with empirical daily returns of US stocks.

</details>


### [472] [Choice of Collateral Currency in Differential Swaps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07863)
*Yining Ding,Ruyi Liu,Marek Rutkowski*

Main category: q-fin.MF

TL;DR: 该论文研究抵押品货币选择对衍生品定价和对冲的影响，特别关注参考隔夜利率后顾平均的差异互换，以SOFR互换为例，分析不同货币抵押账户对估值和风险管理的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球金融危机后，抵押品在衍生品定价中的作用已超越信用风险缓释，融资成本和基差利差成为估值实践的核心。随着LIBOR向无风险利率（RFRs）过渡以及抵押品交易标准化，需要研究抵押品货币选择对衍生品定价和对冲策略的影响。

Method: 扩展Ding等人的先前研究，允许抵押账户使用与合同现金流不同的货币，采用基于期货的复制方法，推导出明确的定价和对冲策略，并进行数值研究验证。

Result: 研究表明，抵押品货币选择对估值和风险管理有显著影响，外币抵押品即使合同现金流完全以本币计价，也会引入额外的风险敞口。数值研究显示抵押品效应可导致显著的估值调整。

Conclusion: 抵押品效应需要在现代多货币建模框架中适当纳入，因为抵押品货币选择对衍生品定价和对冲策略有非平凡影响，特别是在后LIBOR时代抵押品交易标准化的背景下。

Abstract: The role of collateral in derivative pricing has evolved beyond credit risk mitigation, particularly following the global financial crisis, when funding costs and basis spreads became central to valuation practices. This development coincided with the transition from the London Interbank Offered Rate (LIBOR) to risk-free rates (RFRs) and the increasing standardization of collateralised trading. We study the valuation and hedging of a class of differential swaps referencing backward-looking averages of overnight rates, with SOFR swaps appearing as a particular instance. The focus is on the impact of the collateral currency. Extending earlier results Ding et al. [Math. Finance 36 (2026), pp.~180--202], we allow the collateral account to be denominated in a currency different from that of the contractual cash flows and derive explicit pricing and hedging strategies using a futures-based replication approach.
  We show that the choice of collateral currency can have a non-trivial effect on both valuation and risk management. In particular, foreign-currency collateral can introduce additional risk exposures even when contractual cash flows are entirely denominated in the domestic currency. Numerical study demonstrates that collateral effects can lead to significant valuation adjustments and therefore need to be properly incorporated in modern multi-currency modelling frameworks.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [473] [Quantum Technologies and Edge Devices in Electrical Grids: Opportunities, Challenges, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06783)
*Marjorie Hoegen,René Glebke,M. Sahnawaz Alam,Alessandro David,Juan Navarro Arenas,Nikolaus Wirtz,Mario Albanese,Daniele Carta,Felix Motzoi,Antonello Monti,Carsten Schuck,Andrea Benigni,Klaus Wehrle,Ferdinanda Ponci*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 量子技术（量子计算、量子传感、量子通信）可解决现代电力系统边缘设备面临的算力不足、传感精度低、通信安全差等挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代电力系统中，边缘设备面临三大挑战：1）复杂信号处理和决策任务导致过载、延迟和能耗增加；2）传统传感器噪声限制无法检测微小变化，难以及时发现故障早期迹象；3）传统通信存在带宽限制、安全风险和加密需求增加等问题，影响关键电网信息传输。

Method: 探索将量子技术集成到边缘设备中：1）量子计算机为优化和机器学习任务提供指数级加速；2）量子传感器实现原子级精度的信号检测；3）量子通信技术（如量子密钥分发）提供信息论安全保障和快速防篡改传输。

Result: 量子技术有潜力克服传统边缘设备的限制：量子计算处理传统处理器无法处理的复杂任务，量子传感器提供更精确的电网动态视图，量子通信确保信息安全快速传输。

Conclusion: 量子技术为电力系统边缘设备带来革命性改进机会，但集成过程中既有机遇也有挑战，需要进一步探索和实践。

Abstract: In modern power systems, edge devices serve as local hubs that collect data, perform on-site computing, sense electrical parameters, execute control actions, and communicate with neighboring edge devices as part of the larger grid. However, as the number of monitored nodes and control loops grows, traditional edge devices face serious limits. They can become overloaded by complex signal processing and decision tasks, causing delays and higher energy use. Standard sensors hit a noise floor that prevents them from detecting miniature changes, making it harder to spot early signs of faults or instability. Meanwhile, conventional communication links struggle with bandwidth limits, security risks, and rising encryption demands, which together slow down and weaken the transfer of critical grid information. Quantum technologies have the potential to overcome these challenges. Quantum computers can deliver exponential speed-ups for optimization and machine-learning tasks that ordinary processors cannot handle. Quantum sensors can sense signals with atomic precision, giving edge devices a more precise view of grid dynamics. Quantum communication techniques, including quantum key distribution, offer methods to achieve information-theoretic security and ensure that information arrives quickly and without tampering. We explore how quantum technologies can be integrated into edge devices, highlighting both opportunities and challenges.

</details>


### [474] [Adaptive Gain Nonlinear Observer for External Wrench Estimation in Human-UAV Physical Interaction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06933)
*Hussein N. Naser,Hashim A. Hashim,Mojtaba Ahmadi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出自适应增益非线性观测器（AGNO）用于人机交互中估计外部作用力/力矩，无需专用力传感器，适用于非对称质量分布或移动负载的无人机系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人类-无人机物理交互中，准确估计外部作用力/力矩对于实现直观安全的辅助负载运输至关重要。传统方法依赖专用力/力矩传感器，增加了系统重量、成本和复杂性。需要一种无需额外传感硬件的方法来估计交互力。

Method: 提出自适应增益非线性观测器（AGNO），使用完整的非线性动力学模型，显式考虑非恒定惯性矩阵。推导了由两个四旋翼和共享负载组成的协作运输系统的综合动力学模型，并通过基于李雅普诺夫的稳定性分析严格建立了观测器的稳定性。

Result: 仿真结果表明，所提出的观测器在实现直观安全的人机交互方面有效。比较评估显示，AGNO在估计均方根误差方面优于扩展卡尔曼滤波器（EKF），特别是在非线性交互条件下的扭矩估计。该方法通过消除额外的传感硬件，减少了系统重量和成本。

Conclusion: AGNO为人类-无人机物理交互提供了一种准确、鲁棒且实用的外部力/力矩估计方法，无需专用传感器，特别适用于具有非对称质量分布或移动负载的空中系统，增强了实际可行性。

Abstract: This paper presents an Adaptive Gain Nonlinear Observer (AGNO) for estimating the external interaction wrench (forces and torques) in human-UAV physical interaction for assistive payload transportation. The proposed AGNO uses the full nonlinear dynamic model to achieve an accurate and robust wrench estimation without relying on dedicated force-torque sensors. A key feature of this approach is the explicit consideration of the non-constant inertia matrix, which is essential for aerial systems with asymmetric mass distribution or shifting payloads. A comprehensive dynamic model of a cooperative transportation system composed of two quadrotors and a shared payload is derived, and the stability of the observer is rigorously established using Lyapunov-based analysis. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed observer in enabling intuitive and safe human-UAV interaction. Comparative evaluations demonstrate that the proposed AGNO outperforms an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) in terms of estimation root mean square errors (RMSE), particularly for torque estimation under nonlinear interaction conditions. This approach reduces system weight and cost by eliminating additional sensing hardware, enhancing practical feasibility.

</details>


### [475] [Impact of Work Schedule Flexibility on EV Hosting Capacity: Insights from Analyzing Field Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06943)
*Marco Iorio,Mohammad Golgol,Anamitra Pal*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种考虑电动汽车车主工作日程灵活性的优化方法，结合屋顶光伏发电，以提高配电网变压器对电动汽车的承载能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无序的电动汽车充电正在改变居民用电模式，导致配电变压器超负荷运行。虽然可以利用电动汽车车主的工作日程灵活性（混合、远程与现场办公）结合屋顶光伏发电来缓解这一问题，但这一现象尚未得到深入研究。

Method: 提出了基于周工作日程感知的鲁棒优化和机会约束优化模型，用于协调电动汽车充电，以确定变压器的电动汽车承载能力。

Result: 使用亚利桑那州居民馈线数据的分析结果表明，将工作日程灵活性与光伏发电智能结合，可以帮助电力公司有效管理电网需求变化。

Conclusion: 工作日程灵活性与光伏发电的智能组合是管理电网需求变化、提高变压器电动汽车承载能力的有效策略。

Abstract: Uncoordinated electric vehicle (EV) charging is altering residential load patterns and pushing distribution transformers to operate beyond their limits. These outcomes can be offset by exploiting the flexibility in work schedules (hybrid, remote vs. in-person) of EV owners, particularly when combined with rooftop photovoltaic (PV) generation. However, this phenomenon has not been explored in-depth yet. This paper addresses this research gap by introducing weekly work schedule-aware robust and chance-constrained optimization formulations for EV charging coordination to determine a transformer's EV hosting capacity. The results obtained using data from a residential feeder in Arizona indicate that an intelligent combination of work schedule flexibility with PV generation can help power utilities effectively manage changing grid demands.

</details>


### [476] [A SISA-based Machine Unlearning Framework for Power Transformer Inter-Turn Short-Circuit Fault Localization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06962)
*Nanhong Liu,Jingyi Yan,Mucun Sun,Jie Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于SISA的机器遗忘框架，用于电力变压器匝间短路故障定位，通过数据分片隔离技术，在检测到中毒数据时仅重训练受影响分片，避免全模型重训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力设备故障诊断中，传感器故障可能导致训练数据中毒，严重影响机器学习模型性能。模型训练完成后，消除有害数据影响具有挑战性，因为全模型重训练计算量大且耗时。

Method: 采用SISA（分片、隔离、切片、聚合）机器遗忘框架，将训练数据划分为分片和切片，通过独立训练确保每个数据点的影响隔离在特定组成模型中。检测到中毒数据时，仅重训练受影响分片。

Result: 在模拟匝间短路故障条件下的实验表明，该框架的诊断准确率与全重训练几乎相同，同时显著减少了重训练时间。

Conclusion: 提出的SISA-based机器遗忘框架能有效处理电力变压器故障诊断中的数据中毒问题，在保持诊断准确性的同时大幅降低重训练成本。

Abstract: In practical data-driven applications on electrical equipment fault diagnosis, training data can be poisoned by sensor failures, which can severely degrade the performance of machine learning (ML) models. However, once the ML model has been trained, removing the influence of such harmful data is challenging, as full retraining is both computationally intensive and time-consuming. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a SISA (Sharded, Isolated, Sliced, and Aggregated)-based machine unlearning (MU) framework for power transformer inter-turn short-circuit fault (ITSCF) localization. The SISA method partitions the training data into shards and slices, ensuring that the influence of each data point is isolated within specific constituent models through independent training. When poisoned data are detected, only the affected shards are retrained, avoiding retraining the entire model from scratch. Experiments on simulated ITSCF conditions demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves almost identical diagnostic accuracy to full retraining, while reducing retraining time significantly.

</details>


### [477] [Topology-Aware Reinforcement Learning over Graphs for Resilient Power Distribution Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06964)
*Roshni Anna Jacob,Prithvi Poddar,Jaidev Goel,Souma Chowdhury,Yulia R. Gel,Jie Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于拓扑感知图强化学习的配电网停电管理框架，通过嵌入高阶拓扑特征来优化重构和减载，提高供电恢复能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 极端天气和网络攻击导致配电网组件故障和运行中断，传统重构和减载方法需要更智能、自适应的恢复策略。

Method: 采用拓扑感知图强化学习框架，将持久同调等拓扑数据分析工具嵌入图强化学习模型，捕捉配电网高阶拓扑特征。

Result: 在改进的IEEE 123节点测试系统上，相比基线图强化学习模型，该方法获得9-18%更高累积奖励、6%供电量提升和6-8%更少电压违规。

Conclusion: 拓扑数据分析与强化学习结合能实现配电网自愈，支持快速、自适应和自动化恢复，提升配电网韧性。

Abstract: Extreme weather events and cyberattacks can cause component failures and disrupt the operation of power distribution networks (DNs), during which reconfiguration and load shedding are often adopted for resilience enhancement. This study introduces a topology-aware graph reinforcement learning (RL) framework for outage management that embeds higher-order topological features of the DN into a graph-based RL model, enabling reconfiguration and load shedding to maximize energy supply while maintaining operational stability. Results on the modified IEEE 123-bus feeder across 300 diverse outage scenarios demonstrate that incorporating the topological data analysis (TDA) tool, persistence homology (PH), yields 9-18% higher cumulative rewards, up to 6% increase in power delivery, and 6-8% fewer voltage violations compared to a baseline graph-RL model. These findings highlight the potential of integrating RL with TDA to enable self-healing in DNs, facilitating fast, adaptive, and automated restoration.

</details>


### [478] [Communication Network-Aware Missing Data Recovery for Enhanced Distribution Grid Visibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07049)
*Biswas Rudra Jyoti Arka,Md Zahidul Islam,Yuzhang Lin,Vinod M. Vokkarane,Junbo Zhao*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出通信感知的数据恢复框架，通过聚类和路由设计防止传感器共享故障通信链路，结合低秩矩阵补全提高电力系统数据恢复精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电力系统依赖密集传感器网络进行实时监控，但不可靠的通信链路和设备故障常导致测量数据缺失。现有方法仅关注可用测量数据，忽略了传输数据的通信网络作用，当多个传感器共享故障通信链路时会导致大规模空间相关数据丢失

Method: 提出通信感知框架，将传感器分组为平衡集群，设计路由路径限制集群内传感器共享共同通信路径，防止任何集群完全数据丢失。然后对每个集群使用最优奇异值阈值化（OSVT）方法恢复剩余测量数据

Result: 在IEEE标准测试馈线系统上的仿真结果表明，与通信无关的纯测量方法相比，所提框架显著提高了数据恢复精度

Conclusion: 通过整合通信网络的路由约束与低秩矩阵补全，提出的通信感知框架能够有效处理通信故障下的数据恢复问题，提高电力系统监控数据的完整性

Abstract: Power distribution systems increasingly rely on dense sensor networks for real-time monitoring, yet unreliable communication links and equipment malfunctions often result in missing or incomplete measurement sets at the operating center, requiring accurate data recovery techniques. Most existing approaches operate solely on the available measurements and overlook the role of the communication network that delivers sensor data, leading to large, spatially correlated losses when multiple sensors share failing communication links. This paper proposes a communication-aware framework that integrates routing constraints with low-rank matrix completion to improve data recovery accuracy under communication failures. Sensors are grouped into balanced clusters, and routing paths are designed to limit intracluster sensors sharing a common communication path, preventing complete data loss within any cluster. The remaining measurements for each cluster are then recovered using an optimal singular value thresholding (OSVT) method. Simulation results on the IEEE standard test feeder with real-world data demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly improves recovery accuracy compared to communication-agnostic, measurement-only methods.

</details>


### [479] [Statistical Contraction for Chance-Constrained Trajectory Optimization of Non-Gaussian Stochastic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07092)
*Rihan Aaron D'Silva,Hiroyasu Tsukamoto*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于共形推理的分布无关鲁棒轨迹优化与控制方法，为非线性非高斯随机系统提供闭环机会约束保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常需要分布假设或过于保守的结构先验，难以在安全关键应用中验证学习型运动规划器和控制器

Method: 使用共形推理构建闭环动力学置信集，通过联合非共形分数量化收缩条件和随机扰动影响，通过约束紧缩将机会约束转化为确定性约束

Result: 方法提供非发散统计保证，仅需有限样本计算，在数值仿真和硬件实验中成功设计安全动态可行轨迹

Conclusion: 该框架为学习型运动规划器和控制器（如神经收缩度量）在安全关键实际应用中的利用和验证提供了正式途径

Abstract: This paper presents novel method for distribution-free robust trajectory optimization and control of discrete-time, nonlinear, and non-Gaussian stochastic systems, with closed-loop guarantees on chance constraint satisfaction. Our framework employs conformal inference to generate coverage-based confidence sets for the closed-loop dynamics around arbitrary reference trajectories, by constructing a joint nonconformity score to quantify both the validity of contraction (i.e., incremental stability) conditions and the impact of external stochastic disturbance on the closed-loop dynamics, without any distributional assumptions. Via appropriate constraint tightening, chance constraints can be reformulated into tractable, statistically valid deterministic constraints on the reference trajectories. This enables a formal pathway to leverage and validate learning-based motion planners and controllers, such as those with neural contraction metrics, in safety-critical real-world applications. Notably, our statistical guarantees are non-diverging and can be computed with finite samples of the underlying uncertainty, without overly conservative structural priors. We demonstrate our approach in motion planning problems for designing safe, dynamically feasible trajectories in both numerical simulation and hardware experiments.

</details>


### [480] [Reinforcement Learning for Vehicle-to-Grid Voltage Regulation: Single-Hub to Multi-Hub Coordination with Battery-Aware Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07237)
*Jingbo Wang,Roshni Anna Jacob,Harshal D. Kaushik,Jie Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于强化学习的V2G协调框架，使用软演员-评论家算法进行电压调节，通过两阶段训练确保实际可行性，在IEEE 34总线系统上验证性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着电动汽车普及，V2G技术成为电网电压调节的重要资源。传统控制策略难以处理复杂约束和动态环境，需要智能协调框架来平衡电压调节与车队可用性。

Method: 采用软演员-评论家强化学习算法，开发两阶段训练方法：第一阶段聚焦稳定性学习，第二阶段结合电池感知部署。考虑单/多枢纽充电系统和实际车队约束。

Result: 在IEEE 34总线系统仿真中，RL代理在正常场景下性能与基准控制相当；在激进过载情况下，能实现稳健电压恢复（在基准10%内），同时优先保障车队可用性和电池状态保持。

Conclusion: 基于约束感知学习的V2G协调框架可行，能为关键电网服务提供稳健性能，平衡电压调节与车队运营约束，展示了强化学习在电网控制中的实用价值。

Abstract: This paper presents a Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) coordination framework using reinforcement learning (RL). {An intelligent control strategy based on the soft actor-critic algorithm is developed for voltage regulation through single and multi-hub charging systems while respecting realistic fleet constraints. A two-phase training approach integrates stability-focused learning with battery-aware deployment to ensure practical feasibility. Simulation studies on the IEEE 34-bus system validate the framework against a standard Volt-Var/Volt-Watt droop controller. Results indicate that the RL agent achieves performance comparable to the baseline control strategy in nominal scenarios. Under aggressive overloading, it provides robust voltage recovery (within 10% of the baseline) while prioritizing fleet availability and state-of-charge preservation, demonstrating the viability of constraint-aware learning for critical grid services.}

</details>


### [481] [Towards Network-Aware Operation of Integrated Energy Systems: A Comprehensive Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07266)
*Alessandra Parisio*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该综述首次全面分析了综合能源系统的网络感知建模、优化与控制方法，识别了可处理性、可行性保证和可扩展性方面的局限性，并提出了具有理论保证的分布式优化和数据驱动的控制方法等研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管现代城市已作为多能源系统运行，但电力、燃气、供热等网络仍被孤立规划和运营，导致效率低下和灵活性未充分利用。随着分布式能源资源增长，各能源载体间的耦合日益增强，需要跨载体和基础设施的协调运营。

Method: 该综述对综合能源系统的网络感知建模、优化和控制方法进行了全面分析，识别了现有方法在可处理性、可行性保证和可扩展性方面的局限性。

Result: 文献分析发现现有研究常忽视网络约束和拓扑的明确作用，这些因素决定了可行运行区域、影响可扩展性，并决定了如何处理不确定性和形式化保证。

Conclusion: 该综述为未来低碳能源系统的可扩展、网络感知运营框架奠定了基础，提出了包括具有理论保证的分布式优化和数据驱动的控制方法在内的研究方向。

Abstract: Integrated Energy Systems (IES) are systems of interconnected electricity, gas, heating, and cooling networks, where the carriers interact and depend on one another. Beyond these core vectors, IES may also incorporate additional infrastructures, such as hydrogen, transportation and water networks, whenever sector coupling or cross-vector exchanges are relevant. Although modern cities already function as multi-energy systems, these networks are still planned and operated in isolation, which leads to inefficiencies and unused flexibility. As distributed energy resources (DERs) grow, local coupling among electricity, heating, and gas networks becomes stronger, so coordinated operation across carriers and infrastructures is essential. IES can improve efficiency, flexibility, and renewable integration, yet operation is challenging because of complex interdependencies, non-convex behaviors, and multi-scale dynamics of the energy networks. A key point that the literature often overlooks is the explicit role of network constraints and topology, which shape feasible operating regions, affect scalability, and determine how uncertainty and formal guarantees can be addressed. This review provides a first comprehensive analysis of network-aware modeling, optimization, and control methods for IES. We identify methodological limitations related to tractability, feasibility guarantees, and scalability. Building on these insights, we outline research directions that include distributed optimization with theoretical guarantees and control approaches informed by operational data. The review offers a foundation for scalable, network-aware operational frameworks for future low-carbon energy systems.

</details>


### [482] [Multi-Agentic AI for Conflict-Aware rApp Policy Orchestration in Open RAN](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07375)
*Haiyuan Li,Yulei Wu,Dimitra Simeonidou*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于多智能体AI框架的自动化rApp策略生成与编排系统，通过三个LLM智能体（感知、推理、精炼）实现Open RAN中零接触、冲突感知的rApp编排，相比基线方法部署准确率提升70%以上，推理成本降低95%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前Open RAN架构中，rApp（非实时控制器）的策略生成主要依赖人工开发，随着xApp（实时功能）多样性增加，现有方法变得脆弱且难以扩展，需要自动化解决方案。

Method: 提出多智能体AI框架，包含三个基于大语言模型的专用智能体：感知智能体（分析潜在冲突）、推理智能体（合成意图对齐的控制流水线）、精炼智能体（增量优化部署决策），并采用检索增强生成（RAG）和基于记忆的类比推理技术。

Result: 在多种部署场景实验中，该系统相比基线方法实现超过70%的部署准确率提升和95%的推理成本降低，同时保持对未见意图的零样本泛化能力。

Conclusion: 该研究为Open RAN中的完全自主、零接触rApp编排提供了一个可扩展且冲突感知的解决方案，实现了自动化策略生成与部署。

Abstract: Open Radio Access Network (RAN) enables flexible, AI-driven control of mobile networks through disaggregated, multi-vendor components. In this architecture, xApps handle real-time functions, whereas rApps in the non-real-time controller generate strategic policies. However, current rApp development remains largely manual, brittle, and poorly scalable as xApp diversity proliferates. In this work, we propose a Multi-Agentic AI framework to automate rApp policy generation and orchestration. The architecture integrates three specialized large language model (LLM)-based agents, Perception, Reasoning, and Refinement, supported by retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and memory-based analogical reasoning. These agents collectively analyze potential conflicts, synthesize intent-aligned control pipelines, and incrementally refine deployment decisions. Experiments across diverse deployment scenarios demonstrate that the proposed system achieves over 70% improvement in deployment accuracy and 95% reduction in reasoning cost compared to baseline methods, while maintaining zero-shot generalization to unseen intents. These results establish a scalable and conflict-aware solution for fully autonomous, zero-touch rApp orchestration in Open RAN.

</details>


### [483] [Machine Learning for the Internet of Underwater Things: From Fundamentals to Implementation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07413)
*Kenechi Omeke,Attai Abubakar,Michael Mollel,Lei Zhang,Qammer H. Abbasi,Muhammad Ali Imran*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 这篇教程综述系统分析了机器学习在水下物联网(IoUT)中的应用，涵盖了监督学习、无监督学习、强化学习和深度学习等方法，展示了ML在物理层、MAC层、网络层、运输层和应用层的性能提升，包括高达91%的数据包丢失减少和92%的目标检测准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下物联网(IoUT)的发展面临严重挑战：严重的声音衰减、远超陆地无线系统的传播延迟、严格的能量限制以及海洋流动形成的动态拓扑。机器学习(ML)已成为解决这些限制的关键使能技术，能够通过数据驱动机制提升水下无线传感器网络各层的性能。

Method: 这篇教程综述综合分析了2012-2025年间300项研究，系统性地将机器学习方法（监督学习、无监督学习、强化学习和深度学习）应用于水下通信环境。采用分层分析方法，分别考察物理层、MAC层、网络层、运输层和应用层的ML应用。

Result: ML在水下网络中取得了显著性能提升：运输层机制可减少高达91%的数据包丢失；应用层实现92%的目标检测准确率；能量效率提升7-29倍；吞吐量优于传统协议；跨层优化效益达42%。

Conclusion: 机器学习是提升水下网络性能的关键技术，但仍面临数据集有限、计算约束、理论模型与实际部署差距等挑战。调查提出了新兴研究方向和技术路线图，支持ML在可操作水下网络中的采用。

Abstract: The Internet of Underwater Things (IoUT) is becoming a critical infrastructure for ocean observation, marine resource management, and climate science. Its development is hindered by severe acoustic attenuation, propagation delays far exceeding those of terrestrial wireless systems, strict energy constraints, and dynamic topologies shaped by ocean currents. Machine learning (ML) has emerged as a key enabler for addressing these limitations, offering data driven mechanisms that enhance performance across all layers of underwater wireless sensor networks. This tutorial survey synthesises ML methodologies supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement, and deep learning specifically contextualised for underwater communication environments. It outlines the algorithmic principles of each paradigm and examines the conditions under which particular approaches deliver superior performance. A layer wise analysis highlights physical layer gains in localisation and channel estimation, MAC layer adaptations that improve channel utilisation, network layer routing strategies that extend operational lifetime, and transport layer mechanisms capable of reducing packet loss by up to 91 percent. At the application layer, ML enables substantial data compression and object detection accuracies reaching 92 percent. Drawing on 300 studies from 2012 to 2025, the survey documents energy efficiency gains of 7 to 29 times, throughput improvements over traditional protocols, and cross layer optimisation benefits of up to 42 percent. It also identifies persistent barriers, including limited datasets, computational constraints, and the gap between theoretical models and real world deployment. The survey concludes with emerging research directions and a technology roadmap supporting ML adoption in operational underwater networks.

</details>


### [484] [IQC-Based Output-Feedback Control of LPV Systems with Time-Varying Input Delays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07453)
*Fen Wu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于IQC框架的LPV系统时变输入延迟H∞输出反馈控制方法，通过参数依赖Lyapunov函数和动态IQC乘子，建立了凸的延迟依赖LMI综合条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 输入延迟是控制系统性能下降和不稳定的常见原因。现有方法在处理LPV系统时变输入延迟的H∞输出反馈控制问题时存在保守性高、计算复杂或非凸性等局限性。

Method: 结合参数依赖Lyapunov函数和动态IQC乘子，提出精确记忆控制器结构，推导出参数依赖LMI形式的凸延迟依赖综合条件，并提供显式控制器重构公式。

Result: 相比无记忆控制（本质非凸），该方法在性能提升、保守性降低和计算效率方面表现显著，数值算例验证了方法的有效性和广泛适用性。

Conclusion: 该方法为LPV系统时变输入延迟的H∞输出反馈控制提供了系统化解决方案，通过凸优化框架实现了性能优化和保守性降低，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Input delays are a common source of performance degradation and instability in control systems. This paper addresses the $\mathcal{H}_\infty$ output-feedback control problem for LPV systems with time-varying input delays under the integral quadratic constraint (IQC) framework. By integrating parameter-dependent Lyapunov functions with dynamic IQC multipliers, we derive convex, delay-dependent synthesis conditions formulated as parameter-dependent LMIs, enabled by the proposed exact-memory controller structure. An explicit controller reconstruction formula is provided to recover the LPV controller from the LMI solution, avoiding the need to specify the functional form of the parameter-dependent controller gains. While the synthesis problem for memoryless control is inherently non-convex, the proposed approach demonstrates significant performance improvement, reduced conservatism, and computational efficiency for standard output-feedback design. Numerical examples illustrate the effectiveness and broad applicability of the method to LPV systems with time-varying input delays.

</details>


### [485] [Inverse-dynamics observer design for a linear single-track vehicle model with distributed tire dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07499)
*Luigi Romano,Ole Morten Aamo,Jan Åslund,Erik Frisk*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种结合线性单轨模型和轮胎分布表示的创新观测器，用于从标准传感器数据中估计车辆侧滑角和轮胎力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在未知驾驶场景中，准确估计车辆侧滑角和轮胎力对于提高安全性和操控性能至关重要。

Method: 采用双曲偏微分方程（PDEs）的轮胎综合表示，结合线性单轨模型，利用动态反演技术从横摆率和横向加速度测量中重构集总和分布的车辆状态。

Result: 仿真结果表明，即使在存在噪声和模型不确定性的情况下，该观测器也能有效估计侧滑角和轮胎力。

Conclusion: 提出的观测器结合了线性单轨模型和轮胎分布表示，能够仅从标准传感器测量中准确估计关键车辆状态，为车辆安全控制提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Accurate estimation of the vehicle's sideslip angle and tire forces is essential for enhancing safety and handling performances in unknown driving scenarios. To this end, the present paper proposes an innovative observer that combines a linear single-track model with a distributed representation of the tires and information collected from standard sensors. In particular, by adopting a comprehensive representation of the tires in terms of hyperbolic partial differential equations (PDEs), the proposed estimation strategy exploits dynamical inversion to reconstruct the lumped and distributed vehicle states solely from yaw rate and lateral acceleration measurements. Simulation results demonstrate the effectiveness of the observer in estimating the sideslip angle and tire forces even in the presence of noise and model uncertainties.

</details>


### [486] [VB-NET: A physics-constrained gray-box deep learning framework for modeling air conditioning systems as virtual batteries](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07601)
*Yuchen Qi,Ye Guo,Yinliang Xu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: VB-NET：一个物理约束的灰盒深度学习框架，将复杂空调系统转换为标准化虚拟电池模型，解决参数获取、可解释性和数据稀缺问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可再生能源渗透率增加需要解锁需求侧灵活性。空调系统具有显著热惯性，但现有物理和数据驱动模型在参数获取、可解释性和数据稀缺方面存在困难

Method: 提出VB-NET框架，首先数学证明空调与虚拟电池模型的同构等价性，然后设计物理约束的深度学习架构：解耦共享气象驱动与私有建筑热指纹，嵌入可微分物理层，采用多任务学习和终端灵敏度调制

Result: VB-NET在荷电状态跟踪上显著优于传统黑盒模型，成功恢复基础热力学定律得到物理一致的参数；通过仅使用2%到6%的历史数据，克服冷启动困境实现新空调单元的高精度建模

Conclusion: 该研究为聚合分散式空调资源进行电网调节提供了一条可解释且数据高效的途径

Abstract: The increasing penetration of renewable energy necessitates unlocking demand-side flexibility. While air conditioning (AC) systems offer significant thermal inertia, existing physical and data-driven models struggle with parameter acquisition, interpretability, and data scarcity. This paper proposes VB-NET, a physics-constrained gray-box deep learning framework that transforms complex AC thermodynamics into a standardized Virtual Battery (VB) model. We first mathematically prove the isomorphic equivalence between the AC and VB models. Subsequently, VB-NET is designed to strictly enforces physical laws by decoupling shared meteorological drivers from private building thermal fingerprints and embedding a differentiable physics layer. Experimental results demonstrate that VB-NET significantly outperforms conventional black-box models in state of charge tracking while successfully recovering underlying thermodynamic laws to yield physically consistent parameters. Furthermore, utilizing multi-task learning and terminal sensitivity modulation, VB-NET overcomes the cold-start dilemma, achieving high-precision modeling for new AC units using only 2% to 6% of historical data. Ultimately, this study provides an interpretable and data-efficient pathway for aggregating decentralized AC resources for grid regulation.

</details>


### [487] [Tunable Input-to-State Safety with Input Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07736)
*Ming Li,Jin Chen,Dimos V. Dimarogonas*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一个将输入约束集成到可调输入到状态安全(TISSf)框架中的方法，通过几何视角将兼容性要求转化为调谐函数的设计约束，保证安全滤波器的递归可行性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的TISSf调谐函数设计通常没有明确考虑执行器限制，这可能导致与输入约束不兼容。需要解决将一般紧凑输入约束集成到调谐函数合成中的问题

Method: 采用几何视角，将TISSf条件表征为状态依赖的半空间约束，使用支撑函数推导输入兼容性的可验证证书。将兼容性要求转化为调谐函数的设计约束，得到在输入约束下可调谐函数的容许族的下界。针对范数有界、多面体和箱型约束专门化结果

Result: 提出的条件结合调谐函数单调性，保证了输入兼容性和基于二次规划的安全滤波器的递归可行性。通过基于覆盖的采样策略的离线参数选择程序，确保在整个安全集上的兼容性

Conclusion: 该框架成功将输入约束集成到TISSf设计中，通过连接巡航控制应用展示了在TISSf下通过设计强制执行输入约束的鲁棒安全性

Abstract: Tunable input-to-state safety (TISSf) generalizes the input-to-state safety (ISSf) framework by incorporating a tuning function that regulates safety conservatism while preserving robustness against perturbations. Despite its flexibility, the TISSf tuning function is often designed without explicitly incorporating actuator limits, which can lead to incompatibility with input constraints. To address this gap, this paper proposes a framework that integrates general compact input constraints into tuning function synthesis. Leveraging a geometric perspective, we characterize the TISSf condition as a state-dependent half-space constraint and derive a verifiable certificate for input compatibility using support functions. This characterization transforms the compatibility requirement into a design constraint on the tuning function, yielding a prescriptive lower bound that defines an admissible family of tunings under input constraints. These results are specialized to norm-bounded, polyhedral, and box constraints, yielding tractable control design conditions. We show that these conditions, combined with tuning function monotonicity, guarantee input compatibility and recursive feasibility of the resulting quadratic program (QP)-based safety filter. Furthermore, an offline parameter selection procedure using a covering-based sampling strategy ensures compatibility across the entire safe set via a linear program (LP). A connected cruise control (CCC) application demonstrates robust safety under TISSf while enforcing input constraints by design.

</details>


### [488] [Robust Cooperative Output Regulation of Discrete-Time Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07783)
*Kursad Metehan Gul,Selahattin Burak Sarsilmaz*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文研究了离散时间不确定异构多智能体系统的鲁棒协同输出调节问题，提出了基于内模的分布式控制方法，并给出了全局和局部控制增益存在的充分条件及设计方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究离散时间不确定异构多智能体系统的鲁棒协同输出调节问题，解决在系统维度异构和存在不确定性的情况下，如何设计分布式控制律来实现输出调节。

Method: 采用基于内模的分布式控制方法，通过结构化Lyapunov不等式推导出线性矩阵不等式(LMI)作为全局充分条件，同时考虑各智能体的个体名义动力学，提出结构无关的控制问题求解方法。

Result: 证明了问题可解性等价于存在使名义闭环系统矩阵Schur的结构化控制增益，给出了全局LMI条件和局部结构无关控制设计方法，并分析了两种方法产生的控制增益集合之间的关系。

Conclusion: 本文为离散时间不确定异构多智能体系统的鲁棒协同输出调节提供了有效的分布式控制设计框架，包括全局和局部两种设计视角，并建立了它们之间的联系。

Abstract: This article considers robust cooperative output regulation of discrete-time uncertain heterogeneous (in dimension) multi-agent systems (MASs). We show that the solvability of this problem with an internal model-based distributed control law reduces to the existence of a structured control gain that makes the nominal closed-loop system matrix of the MAS Schur. Accordingly, this article focuses on global and agent-wise local sufficient conditions for the existence and design of such a structured control gain. Based on a structured Lyapunov inequality, we present a convexification that yields a linear matrix inequality (LMI), whose feasibility is a global sufficient condition for the existence and design. Considering the individual nominal dynamics of each agent, the existence is also ensured if each agent solves a structure-free control problem. Its convexification yields LMIs that allow each agent to separately design its structure-free control gain. Lastly, we study the relationships between the sets of control gains emerging from both global and local perspectives.

</details>


### [489] [Temperature-Aware Scheduling of LLM Inference in Large-Scale Geo-Distributed Edge Data Centers with Distributed Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07810)
*Arash Khalatbarisoltani,Amin Mahmoudi,Jie Han,Muhammad Saeed,Wenxue Liu,Jinwen Li,Solmaz Kahourzade,Amirmehdi Yazdani,Xiaosong Hu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出温度感知的分布式优化方法，通过考虑地理位置温度差异，联合优化LLM推理阶段的能耗、碳排放、水耗和响应时间，提升边缘数据中心的可持续性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM推理阶段在数据中心产生的碳足迹和水消耗日益严重，传统冷却系统效率模型忽略地理位置温度差异，而温度多样性可显著影响冷却能耗，需要综合考虑多目标优化来提升可持续性。

Method: 采用基于交替方向乘子法（ADMM）的分布式优化算法，联合优化LLM能耗成本、碳排放、首token响应时间和水消耗，考虑澳大利亚地理分布式边缘数据中心的温度差异。

Result: 方法能降低冷却能耗消耗，提升地理分布式云环境的整体成本效率，证明温度感知优化对LLM托管可持续性的有效性。

Conclusion: 温度感知的联合优化方法能有效解决LLM推理阶段的环境影响问题，通过利用地理位置温度多样性，为分布式边缘数据中心提供可持续的LLM托管解决方案。

Abstract: The environmental impact of Large Language Models (LLMs) on data centers hosting these models is becoming a significant concern. While many efforts have focused on reducing the substantial training overhead of LLMs, carbon and water consumption during the inference phase can often surpass the costs associated with their training. The cooling systems of data centers are crucial in this context, but they are frequently modeled with a location-independent efficiency term. However, their energy efficiency is highly influenced by ambient temperature, which can vary significantly across different geographical locations. Leveraging this temperature diversity can help reduce total cooling energy costs and improve the performance of edge data centers. To address these critical sustainability issues related to LLMs, this study proposes a temperature-aware approach that co-optimizes LLM energy costs, carbon emissions, time-to-first token, and water consumption. The approach employs a distributed optimization algorithm based on an alternating direction method of multipliers, aimed at enhancing the sustainability of LLM hosting across geo-distributed edge data centers in Australia. Our method demonstrates reductions in cooling energy consumption and improves overall cost efficiency for geo-distributed cloud environments.

</details>


### [490] [A Curved Monopole Antenna for HF Radar with Enhanced Gain and Bandwidth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07818)
*Masoud Salmani Arani,Reza Shahidi,Lihong Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种用于天波HF雷达的新型弯曲单极子天线，通过优化曲率和直线段长度，在15MHz实现更好的阻抗匹配、更宽带宽和更高增益，并扩展到12单元阵列，显著提升雷达性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统四分之一波长单极子天线在HF雷达应用中存在性能限制，需要更紧凑、宽带且可扩展的天线设计来提升天波超视距雷达系统的性能。

Method: 设计并仿真新型弯曲单极子天线，系统研究曲率和固定段长度对天线性能的影响，通过参数化分析优化设计，并将单单元设计扩展到12单元线性阵列。

Result: 优化后的弯曲单极子在15MHz实现18.5%的增益提升和400kHz带宽扩展；12单元阵列在θ=30°时达到14.04dBi增益，相比参考阵列提升24%，具有稳定的嵌入单元行为和改善的低至中仰角增益。

Conclusion: 提出的弯曲单极子天线为下一代HF雷达阵列提供了紧凑、宽带且可扩展的解决方案，显著提升了天波超视距雷达系统的性能。

Abstract: This paper presents the design and simulation of a new curved monopole antenna optimized for skywave HF radar applications, with a systematic investigation of the effects of curvature and fixed-section length on antenna performance. The proposed design achieves improved impedance matching, broader bandwidth, and enhanced realized gain compared to a conventional quarter-wavelength monopole at 15 MHz. Parametric analysis shows that fully bending the monopole degrades performance, whereas introducing a straight section and carefully optimizing the curvature enables a 18.5% gain increase and a 400 kHz bandwidth expansion. The single-element design is further extended to a 12-element linear array with 0.45λ spacing (where λ is the wavelength), demonstrating stable embedded-element behavior and improved low-to- moderate elevation gain for skywave over-the-horizon radar operation. At θ = 30°, the proposed array achieves 14.04 dBi compared to 13.11 dBi for the reference array, corresponding to 24% gain enhancement, which is significant in high-power HF radar systems. These results confirm that the proposed curved monopole antenna provides a compact, broadband, and scalable solution for next-generation HF radar arrays.

</details>


### [491] [Leveraging Quantum Annealing for Large-Scale Household Energy Scheduling with Hydrogen Storage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07823)
*Arash Khalatbarisoltani,Amin Mahmoudi,Jie Han,Muhammad Saeed,Wenxue Liu,Jinwen Li,Solmaz Kahourzade,Amirmehdi Yazdani,Xiaosong Hu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于分层量子退火(QA)的模型预测控制功率分配框架，用于解决微电网中氢能系统（多个燃料电池和电解槽）的复杂优化问题，加速大规模应用中的计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 氢能集成到微电网有助于吸收可再生能源的间歇性，但涉及多个燃料电池和电解槽的大规模应用存在复杂的优化问题，特别是大量二元决策变量导致计算困难。

Method: 采用分层量子退火(QA)模型预测控制框架：1）日前阶段确定燃料电池和电解槽的启停状态；2）短期阶段优化燃料电池输出功率和电解槽产氢速率。通过澳大利亚多户家庭案例验证可行性。

Result: 传统优化方法在家庭数量较少时表现良好，但随着连接家庭数量增加，量子退火方法变得更为合适，能在可接受范围内有效解决问题。

Conclusion: 分层量子退火框架能够加速微电网氢能系统的复杂优化问题，特别适用于大规模应用场景，为解决可再生能源集成中的计算挑战提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Hydrogen integration into microgrids facilitates the absorption of intermittencies from renewable energy resources. However, significant challenges remain due to complex optimization problems, particularly in large-scale applications involving multiple fuel cells (FCs) and electrolyzers (ELs) with numerous binary decision variables. This paper presents a hierarchical quantum annealing (QA) model predictive control-based power allocation framework aimed at accelerating these optimization problems. First, in a day-ahead stage, the framework determines the startup and shutdown of the FCs and ELs. The short-term stage then refines the output power of the FCs and the hydrogen generation rate of the ELs. The feasibility is evaluated through a case study consisting of multiple households in Australia. Our findings demonstrate that while the traditional optimization approach performs satisfactorily in scenarios with a small number of households, the QA approach becomes more appropriate and effectively solves the problem within an acceptable range as the number of connected households increases.

</details>


### [492] [A Novel Phase-Noise Module for the QUCS Circuit Simulator. Part II : Noise Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07828)
*Torsten Djurhuus,Viktor Krozer*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 在QUCS开源电路仿真器中实现了一个基于统一时域方法的相位噪声分析模块，该模块采用全新的理论框架，超越了传统LTI/LTV方法，能够分析自由运行和耦合振荡器在大信号稳态下的噪声响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代通信和遥感系统中普遍使用时序电路，但现有商业EDA工具在噪声仿真能力方面存在局限。需要开发基于先进随机建模技术的开源仿真工具，以预测、合成和优化噪声扰动下自主电路在大信号稳态条件下的性能。

Method: 采用作者最近提出的统一时域方法，开发了完全不受经验或现象学建模技术（如LTI和LTV理论）约束的理论框架。论文引入了新的统一闭式表达式，用于描述一般耦合振荡电路在噪声扰动下的幅度和相位-幅度相关响应。

Result: 在QUCS开源电路仿真器中成功实现了相位噪声分析模块，该工具在多个领域的噪声仿真能力和范围超过了当前市场上的商业EDA工具。这是两篇系列论文的第二部分，第一部分讨论了底层稳态分析模块的实现。

Conclusion: 该研究开发的开源仿真器应用了先进的状态随机建模技术，为工业电路设计提供了强大的噪声仿真工具，对预测、合成和优化噪声扰动下自主电路的性能具有重要的科学和工业应用价值。

Abstract: The paper documents the implementation of a novel phase-noise analysis module within the open-source QUCS circuit simulator environment. The underlying algorithm is based on a rigorous, unified time-domain methodology of (coupled) oscillator noise-response, recently proposed by the authors. The theoretical approach used to develop this model is entirely unconstrained by any empirical and/or phenomenological modelling techniques, such as e.g. LTI and LTV theory, and this differentiates it from all prior proposals on this topic. The paper introduces important, and previously unpublished, extensions to this framework, in the form of novel unified closed-form expressions for both the amplitude and phase-amplitude correlation response of a general coupled oscillating circuit perturbed by noise. The research discussed herein has many important scientific and industrial applications w.r.t. predicting, synthesizing and optimizing the performance of noise-perturbed free-running and coupled autonomous circuits operating under large-signal steady-state conditions. These timing circuits are ubiquitous in all modern communication and remote-sensing systems and the developed simulation tools will prove to have great impact in various areas of industrial circuit design. This paper represents second part of a two-part series with the first part discussing the implementation of the underlying steady-state analysis module. The open-source simulator, discussed and developed herein, applies advanced state-of-the-art stochastic modelling techniques, in-order to produce noise simulation tools with capabilities and scope which, in many areas, exceed what is found in the commercial EDAs currently on the market.

</details>


### [493] [Robust control synthesis for uncertain linear systems with input saturation using mixed IQCs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07907)
*Xu Zhang,Fen Wu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种基于积分二次约束(IQC)的鲁棒控制综合方法，用于处理具有输入饱和的不确定线性系统，通过混合IQC和缩放技术提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法在处理输入饱和和时变不确定性时通常使用单一的静态扇区条件，性能有限。需要开发更有效的鲁棒控制方法，能够同时处理死区非线性和时变不确定性，并提升系统性能。

Method: 1. 将系统重构为线性分式表示(LFR)，同时捕获死区非线性和时变不确定性；2. 结合混合IQC耗散不等式和二次Lyapunov函数建立鲁棒稳定性条件；3. 针对时变结构不确定性，基于IQC表征开发新的缩放有界实引理；4. 将H∞综合条件表达为线性矩阵不等式(LMI)，包含IQC乘子的缩放因子作为决策变量。

Result: 1. 相比传统基于单一静态扇区条件的方法，提出的方法通过使用缩放混合IQC获得了改进的L2增益性能；2. 合成条件可表示为数值可解的LMI；3. 通过二阶不确定系统和倒立摆实例验证了方法的有效性，并展示了优于抗饱和设计的性能。

Conclusion: 提出的基于IQC的鲁棒控制综合方法能够有效处理具有输入饱和和时变不确定性的线性系统，通过混合IQC和缩放技术显著提升控制性能，且合成条件具有数值可解性。

Abstract: This paper develops a robust control synthesis method for uncertain linear systems with input saturation in the framework of integral quadratic constraints (IQCs). The system is reformulated as a linear fractional representation (LFR) that captures both dead-zone nonlinearity and time-varying uncertainties. By combining mixed IQC-based dissipation inequalities with quadratic Lyapunov functions, sufficient conditions for robust stabilization are established. Compared with conventional approaches based on a single static sector condition for the dead-zone nonlinearity, the proposed method yields improved $\mathcal{L}_2$-gain performance through the use of scaled mixed IQCs. For systems subject to time-varying structured uncertainties, a new scaled bounded real lemma is further developed based on the IQC characterization. The resulting $\mathcal{H}_\infty$ synthesis conditions are expressed as linear matrix inequalities (LMIs), which are numerically tractable in all decision variables, including the scaling factors in the IQC multipliers. The proposed method is validated using a second-order uncertain system in linear fractional form, and its superiority over an anti-windup design is further illustrated by a cart-pendulum example.

</details>


### [494] [Model-Free DRL Control for Power Inverters: From Policy Learning to Real-Time Implementation via Knowledge Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.07964)
*Yang Yang,Chenggang Cui,Xitong Niu,Jiaming Liu,Chuanlin Zhang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于策略蒸馏的模型免费控制框架，解决DRL在电力逆变器中控制性能与计算负担的权衡问题，实现微秒级推理时间和优越的瞬态响应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决深度强化学习在电力逆变器应用中控制性能与计算负担之间的权衡问题，克服模型免费代理的收敛不稳定性和稳态误差，实现高效部署。

Method: 采用策略蒸馏框架，建立误差能量引导的混合奖励机制来约束探索空间，集成自适应重要性加权机制以放大波动区域的重要性，将重型DRL策略压缩为轻量神经网络。

Result: 在千瓦级硬件实验平台上验证，推理时间降至微秒级，相比传统方法具有优越的瞬态响应速度和参数鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 提出的策略蒸馏框架成功解决了DRL在电力逆变器部署中的计算瓶颈，在保持控制性能的同时实现了高效部署，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: In response to the trade-off between control performance and computational burden hindering the deployment of Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) in power inverters, this paper presents a novel model-free control framework leveraging policy distillation. To handle the convergence instability and steady-state errors inherent in model-free agents, an error energy-guided hybrid reward mechanism is established to theoretically constrain the exploration space. More specifically, an adaptive importance weighting mechanism is integrated into the distillation architecture to amplify the significance of fluctuation regions, ensuring high-quality transfer of transient control logic by mitigating the observational bias dominated by steady-state data. This approach efficiently compresses the heavy DRL policy into a lightweight neural network, retaining the desired control performance while overcoming the computational bottleneck during deployment. The proposed method is validated through a hardware-based kilowatt-level experimental platform. Experimental comparison results with traditional methods demonstrate that the proposed technique reduces inference time to the microsecond level and achieves superior transient response speed and parameter robustness.

</details>


### [495] [Distributed Coordination Algorithms with Efficient Communication for Open Multi-Agent Systems with Dynamic Communication Links and Processing Delays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08038)
*Jiaqi Hu,Karl H. Johansson,Apostolos I. Rikos*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出三种通信高效的分布式量化平均共识算法，分别针对不同开放多智能体系统场景：稳定活跃节点集、有界处理延迟、以及持续节点进出动态网络。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对开放多智能体系统中动态有向通信链路和节点动态进出的挑战，需要设计通信高效的分布式量化平均共识算法，以支持环境监测等实际应用。

Method: 提出三种算法：1) 针对最终稳定活跃节点集的量化平均；2) 扩展支持有界处理延迟；3) 处理持续节点进出动态网络的量化平均，涵盖历史和活跃节点。

Result: 算法正确性得到证明，建立了有限时间收敛的充分必要拓扑条件，数值模拟显示快速有限时间收敛，对不同网络规模、进出率、处理延迟具有鲁棒性，优于现有算法。

Conclusion: 提出的三种通信高效分布式量化平均共识算法能有效处理开放多智能体系统的动态特性，为环境监测等应用提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: In this paper we focus on the distributed quantized average consensus problem in open multi-agent systems consisting of dynamic directed communication links among active nodes. We propose three communication-efficient distributed algorithms designed for different scenarios. Our first algorithm solves the quantized averaging problem over the currently active node set under finite network openness (i.e., when the active set eventually stabilizes). Our second algorithm extends the aforementioned approach for the case where nodes suffer from arbitrary bounded processing delays. Our third algorithm operates over indefinitely open multi-agent networks with dynamic communication links (i.e., with continuous node arrivals and departures), computing the average that incorporates both active and historically active nodes. We analyze our algorithms' operation, establish their correctness, and present novel necessary and sufficient topological conditions ensuring their finite-time convergence. Numerical simulations on distributed sensor fusion for environmental monitoring demonstrate fast finite-time convergence and robustness across varying network sizes, departure/arrival rates, and processing delays. Finally, it is shown that our proposed algorithms compare favorably to algorithms in the existing literature.

</details>


### [496] [Trajectory Tracking Control Design for Autonomous Helicopters with Guaranteed Error Bounds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08045)
*Philipp Schitz,Johann C. Dauer,Paolo Mercorelli*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于鲁棒正不变集(RPI)的自主直升机轨迹跟踪误差界计算框架，通过建立闭环平移误差动力学，计算椭球RPI集得到位置误差界，比较三种控制器架构的保守性和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为自主直升机提供形式化保证的轨迹跟踪误差界，作为上层轨迹规划中的认证缓冲区，确保飞行安全性和可靠性。

Method: 建立闭环平移误差动力学，将其转化为具有有界加性和状态相关扰动的多面体线性参数变化形式，计算椭球鲁棒正不变集(RPI)得到位置误差界。

Result: 三种控制器架构均满足推导的误差界，非线性直升机模型仿真验证了方法的有效性，同时揭示了动力学保真度与不变集计算保守性之间的权衡。

Conclusion: 提出的RPI集框架能够为自主直升机提供形式化保证的轨迹跟踪误差界，为上层轨迹规划提供认证缓冲区，不同控制器架构在保守性和性能之间存在权衡。

Abstract: This paper presents a systematic framework for computing formally guaranteed trajectory tracking error bounds for autonomous helicopters based on Robust Positive Invariant (RPI) sets. The approach focuses on establishing a closed-loop translational error dynamics which is cast into polytopic linear parameter-varying form with bounded additive and state-dependent disturbances. Ellipsoidal RPI sets are computed, yielding explicit position error bounds suitable as certified buffer zones in upper-level trajectory planning. Three controller architectures are compared with respect to the conservatism of their error bounds and tracking performance. Simulation results on a nonlinear helicopter model demonstrate that all architectures respect the derived bounds, while highlighting trade-offs between dynamical fidelity and conservatism in invariant set computation.

</details>


### [497] [Augmented Model Predictive Control: A Balance between Satellite Agility and Computation Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08078)
*Yiming Wang,Mihindukulasooriya Sheral Crescent Tissera,Haihong Yu,Kai Jie Ethan Foo,Sean Yeo Keyuan,Ankit Srivastava,Hao An*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种增强型MPC方法，用于提高敏捷地球观测卫星的机动性能，在保持线性MPC计算简单性的同时实现了非线性MPC的高性能特性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然卫星执行器技术已有显著进步，但针对提高卫星敏捷性的控制策略研究相对不足。现有研究较少关注如何平衡敏捷性需求与硬件实现约束。

Method: 论文对不同的MPC公式进行比较分析，并提出了一种增强型MPC方法。该方法通过创新的控制策略，在保持线性MPC计算效率的同时，实现了接近非线性MPC的性能。

Result: 通过数值仿真和物理实验验证了所提方法的有效性和可行性。增强型MPC方法成功平衡了敏捷性需求和硬件实现约束，实现了高性能控制。

Conclusion: 提出的增强型MPC方法为敏捷地球观测卫星提供了一种有效的控制解决方案，能够在满足硬件约束的同时显著提升卫星的机动性能，具有重要的工程应用价值。

Abstract: Agile earth observation satellites employ multiple actuators to enable flexible and responsive imaging capabilities. While significant advancements in actuator technology have enhanced satellites' torque and momentum, relatively little attention has been given to control strategies specifically tailored to improve satellite agility. This paper provides a comparative analysis of different Model Predictive Control (MPC) formulations and introduces an augmented-MPC method that effectively balances agility requirements with hardware implementation constraints. The proposed method achieves the high-performance characteristics of nonlinear MPC while preserving the computational simplicity of linear MPC. Numerical simulations and physical experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness and feasibility of the proposed approach.

</details>


### [498] [Coupling Europe's Capacity Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08248)
*Kamal Adekola,Laurens de Vries,Kenneth Bruninx*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于流式市场耦合逻辑的欧洲容量市场新设计，通过跨区域容量共享降低系统成本并确保网络约束下的可交付性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 欧盟成员国为应对日益增长的电力充足性风险而引入国家容量机制，但在高度互联的欧洲电力系统中，孤立的国别机制效率低下。现有跨境参与安排容易导致投资不足或过剩，且未能恰当评估互联容量对成员国充足性目标的贡献。

Method: 提出基于流式市场耦合逻辑的新型欧洲容量市场概念设计，通过定制化的长期均衡问题，在多区域案例研究中比较不同市场设计情景。

Result: 研究表明，基于流式耦合的容量市场能够利用邻近市场区域的可用容量来降低系统成本，并在所有稀缺情况下确保网络约束下的可交付性。

Conclusion: 流式耦合的容量市场设计为欧洲电力系统提供了一种更高效的跨区域容量共享机制，能够更好地整合互联容量并优化投资决策。

Abstract: European Member States are increasingly introducing national capacity mechanisms (CMs) to manage growing adequacy risks. However, isolated national CMs are inefficient in highly interconnected electricity systems, such as the European system. While progress has been made in facilitating cross-border participation by generation capacity in CMs, existing arrangements are prone to under- or over-investment and do not properly value the contribution of interconnection capacity to Member States' adequacy targets. In this paper, we propose a novel conceptual design for a coupled European capacity market that utilises the logic of flow-based market coupling. In a comparative analysis of different market design scenarios in an illustrative multi-zone case study, using a bespoke long-run equilibrium problem, we show that the proposed flow-based coupling of capacity markets reduces system costs by harnessing available capacity in neighbouring market zones while ensuring deliverability with respect to network constraints in all scarcity situations.

</details>


### [499] [Adaptive Tracking Control of Euler-Lagrange Systems with Time-Varying State and Input Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08307)
*Poulomee Ghosh,Shubhendu Bhasin*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种用于欧拉-拉格朗日系统的自适应控制框架，能在参数不确定性和有界扰动下强制执行用户定义的时变状态和输入约束，无需实时优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对欧拉-拉格朗日系统在存在参数不确定性和有界扰动时，如何保证时变状态和输入约束的满足，同时避免计算复杂的实时优化问题。

Method: 将时变障碍李雅普诺夫函数与饱和控制律相结合，开发离线可验证的可行性条件来确保控制策略的存在性，并证明所有闭环信号的有界性。

Result: 理论证明了约束满足和闭环信号有界性，通过在2自由度直升机模型上的实时实验验证了方法的有效性和实际可行性。

Conclusion: 该方法成功实现了欧拉-拉格朗日系统在不确定性和扰动下的时变约束控制，无需实时优化，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

Abstract: This paper presents an adaptive control framework for Euler-Lagrange (E-L) systems that enforces user-defined time-varying state and input constraints in the presence of parametric uncertainties and bounded disturbances. The proposed design integrates a time-varying barrier Lyapunov Function (TVBLF) with a saturated control law to guarantee constraint satisfaction without resorting to real-time optimization. A key contribution is the development of an offline, verifiable feasibility condition that certifies the existence of a feasible control policy for any prescribed pair of time-varying state and input envelopes. Additionally, we prove boundedness of all closed-loop signals. Real-time experiments conducted on a 2-DoF helicopter model validate the efficacy and practical viability of the proposed method.

</details>


### [500] [The coordination between TSO and DSO in the context of energy transition - A review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08335)
*Hang Nguyen,Koen Kok,Trung Thai Tran,Phuong H. Nguyen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文综述了输配电系统运营商（TSO/DSO）协调方案，旨在利用分布式能源灵活性资源维持系统平衡并避免网络拥堵。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 能源转型带来技术挑战，包括能源系统集成复杂性、不确定性管理和激励用户参与。TSO与DSO之间的协调对于应对这些挑战至关重要，特别是如何有效利用分布式能源的灵活性资源。

Method: 对协调方案进行分类和评估，分析不同方案的优缺点，并建立一般性场景描述运营商与第三方在平衡市场中的交互，考虑有协调和无协调两种情况。

Result: 提出了广泛的协调方案和灵活性服务利用方法，分析了各种方案的利弊，为TSO/DSO有效利用灵活性资源提供了系统性框架。

Conclusion: TSO/DSO协调是能源转型中的关键环节，通过适当的协调方案可以最大化分布式能源灵活性资源的利用，维持系统平衡并避免网络拥堵，但实际应用中仍面临挑战。

Abstract: Nowadays, energy transition is ongoing in many countries, aiming to reduce dependence on fossil fuels and CO2 emissions. Besides the positive impacts on the environment, this transition brings technical challenges to the system operators, such as the intricacies of energy system integration, diminishing uncertainty, and incentivizing customers with advanced transaction models. The coordination between the Transmission system operator (TSO) and the Distribution system operator (DSO) is one of the most important aspects of encountering these obstacles. This coordination enhances the utilization of flexibility from Distributed energy resources (DERs) by incentivizing the market parties with better willingness to pay schemes. This paper provides an overview of the coordination schemes (CS), their classification, assessment of the current situation and the challenges associated with applying these schemes in practical context. The main purpose is to investigate the most effective way for TSO/DSOs to use the flexibility resource to maintain the balancing of the entire system while ensuring no congestion occurs in the network. A broad range of possible coordination schemes along with exploiting flexibility services is presented and the pros and cons are analyzed. Additionally, the study presents a general scenario that describes the interaction between the operators and the third party in providing service to the balancing market, considering cases with and without coordination.

</details>


### [501] [Eigenvalue Patterns and Participation Analysis of Symmetric Renewable Energy Power Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08351)
*Yao Qin,Yitong Li,Wei Wang,Shaoze Zhou,Zheng Wei,Jinjun Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该论文研究了对称可再生能源电力系统的模态分析，提出了内群模式和群网模式的概念，并引入了群参与因子来处理重复和相近模式，为大规模电力系统稳定性分析提供了新方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大规模电力系统集成大量基于逆变器的资源，状态空间分析面临系统状态激增导致模态分析复杂化的挑战。可再生能源电力系统通常包含多个同质发电单元，这种对称性可被利用来简化稳定性分析。

Method: 研究了三种对称可再生能源电力系统：理想对称、准对称和群对称系统。定义了内群模式（描述群内子系统间交互）和群网模式（描述群与外部电网交互）。提出了群参与因子概念来扩展传统参与因子在重复和相近模式中的应用。讨论了这些模式的不变性特性。

Result: 理论分析表明对称系统具有特殊的特征值模式和参与因子特性。通过不同类型和规模的示例电力系统的数值结果和电磁暂态仿真验证了理论进展的有效性。

Conclusion: 对称性分析为大规模可再生能源电力系统的稳定性分析提供了新视角，提出的群参与因子和内群/群网模式概念有助于系统稳定性分析和针对性优化。

Abstract: State-space analysis is widely employed for examining power system dynamics but faces challenges in large-scale power systems integrated with numerous inverter-based resources (IBRs), where the significant increase of system states complicates modal analysis. Notably, renewable energy power systems often consist of multiple homogeneous generation units. This uniformity, termed symmetry in this paper, can facilitate the system stability analysis. Eigenvalue patterns and participation factors in three types of symmetric renewable energy power systems are investigated, including ideally-, quasi-, and group-symmetric systems. An ideally-symmetric (quasi-symmetric) system comprises a group of identical (similar) subsystems connected to an external grid. A system containing multiple such groups is termed group-symmetric. In these symmetric systems, two types of modes are defined to characterize different interactions: inner-group modes, which describe the interactions among subsystems within a single group, and group-grid modes, which describe the interactions between the groups and the external grid. A new concept termed group participation factor is also proposed to extend the use of conventional participation factors for repeated and close modes. In addition, the invariance properties of the inner-group modes and group-grid modes are discussed. The findings provide insights for stability analysis and targeted optimization in power systems. Theoretical advances are validated through numerical results and electromagnetic transient (EMT) simulations on example power systems of varied types and scales.

</details>


### [502] [Integrating Lagrangian Neural Networks into the Dyna Framework for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08468)
*Shreya Das,Kundan Kumar,Muhammad Iqbal,Outi Savolainen,Dominik Baumann,Laura Ruotsalainen,Simo Särkkä*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出使用拉格朗日神经网络(LNN)在基于Dyna的模型强化学习框架中，通过强制执行拉格朗日结构来提升动力学模型精度，并比较了两种优化器的训练效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于模型的强化学习(MBRL)虽然样本效率高，但依赖学习到的动力学模型精度。传统黑盒方法不遵循物理定律，在面对与训练集不同的数据时预测不准确。

Method: 采用拉格朗日神经网络(LNN)在Dyna-based MBRL框架中训练模型，强制执行拉格朗日结构。使用基于随机梯度和基于状态估计的两种优化器训练网络权重。

Result: 基于状态估计的优化方法在神经网络训练中比基于随机梯度的方法收敛更快。仿真结果验证了所提出的LNN-based Dyna框架在MBRL中的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过引入物理约束的拉格朗日神经网络，能够提升基于模型的强化学习中动力学模型的准确性和泛化能力，特别是基于状态估计的优化器能加速训练收敛。

Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) is sample-efficient but depends on the accuracy of the learned dynamics, which are often modeled using black-box methods that do not adhere to physical laws. Those methods tend to produce inaccurate predictions when presented with data that differ from the original training set. In this work, we employ Lagrangian neural networks (LNNs), which enforce an underlying Lagrangian structure to train the model within a Dyna-based MBRL framework. Furthermore, we train the LNN using stochastic gradient-based and state-estimation-based optimizers to learn the network's weights. The state-estimation-based method converges faster than the stochastic gradient-based method during neural network training. Simulation results are provided to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed LNN-based Dyna framework for MBRL.

</details>


### [503] [Behavioral Generative Agents for Power Dispatch and Auction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08477)
*Shaoze Li,Justin S. Kim,Cong Chen*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: LLM驱动的生成智能体为电力系统决策建模提供了灵活框架，能够模拟人类行为模式并超越传统数学模型的刚性限制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数学模型在模拟电力调度和拍卖中的人类决策时过于刚性，无法捕捉真实的行为复杂性。本文旨在探索生成智能体是否能提供更灵活、更具表达力的建模方法。

Method: 设计了两个概念验证实验：1) 家庭电池管理系统测试平台，包含随机电价和停电干预，使用上下文学习模块将强推理模型的行为模式迁移到小型LLM；2) 电力网络接入的同步上升拍卖研究，设计基于规则、短视和战略目标的ICL提示。

Result: 实验表明：1) LLM智能体能够优先考虑停电后的能源储备而非短期利润；2) 结构化提示结合ICL使LLM智能体既能复制经济理性策略，又能展现系统性行为偏差。

Conclusion: LLM驱动的智能体为电力系统应用中的人类决策建模提供了灵活且富有表达力的测试平台，能够超越传统优化方法的局限性。

Abstract: This paper presents positive initial evidence that generative agents can relax the rigidity of traditional mathematical models for human decision-making in power dispatch and auction settings. We design two proof-of-concept energy experiments with generative agents powered by a large language model (LLM). First, we construct a home battery management testbed with stochastic electricity prices and blackout interventions, and benchmark LLM decisions against dynamic programming. By incorporating an in-context learning (ICL) module, we show that behavioral patterns discovered by a stronger reasoning model can be transferred to a smaller LLM via example-based prompting, leading agents to prioritize post-blackout energy reserves over short-term profit. Second, we study LLM agents in simultaneous ascending auctions (SAA) for power network access, comparing their behavior with an optimization benchmark, the straightforward bidding strategy. By designing ICL prompts with rule-based, myopic, and strategic objectives, we find that structured prompting combined with ICL enables LLM agents to both reproduce economically rational strategies and exhibit systematic behavioral deviations. Overall, these results suggest that LLM-powered agents provide a flexible and expressive testbed for modeling human decision-making in power system applications.

</details>


### [504] [Input Dexterity and Output Negotiation in Feedback-Linearizable Nonlinear Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08480)
*Mirko Mizzoni,Pieter van Goor,Barbara Bazzana,Antonio Franchi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于任务相对性的非线性系统执行器输入分类方法，将输入分为必需、冗余和灵巧三类，并建立了统一的线性化控制器框架，可在任务降级时实现无瞬变切换。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在非线性系统的输入输出反馈线性化框架中，需要一种系统化的方法来分类执行器输入，以支持任务降级时的优雅切换。当前缺乏对输入如何影响具体任务的分类方法，特别是在部分执行器失效或需要降级任务时。

Method: 基于任务相对性分类执行器输入：必需输入（实现精确线性化所需）、冗余输入（移除不影响系统）、灵巧输入（可停用但仍保持降级任务的精确线性化）。通过动态延拓将灵巧输入转化为额外输出通道，建立统一线性化控制器框架。

Result: 证明了输入子集是灵巧输入的充要条件，建立了通过动态延拓实现统一控制器的理论框架。在全驱动空中平台的仿真中展示了从六维姿态跟踪到降级任务的优雅切换，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的任务相对性输入分类方法为非线性系统提供了统一的线性化控制器框架，能够在执行器失效或任务降级时实现无瞬变切换，提高了系统的鲁棒性和适应性。

Abstract: We introduce a task-relative taxonomy of actuator inputs for nonlinear systems within the input-output feedback-linearization framework. Given a flat output specifying the task, inputs are classified as essential, redundant, or dexterity: essential inputs are required for exact linearization, redundant inputs can be removed without effect, and dexterity inputs can be deactivated while preserving exact linearization of a reduced task. We show that a subset is dexterity if and only if, under a suitable dynamic prolongation, it can appear as additional output channels (flat-input complement) on a common validity set. Whenever a family of systems obtained by (de)activating dexterity inputs admits a common prolongation, the family can be interpreted as a single prolonged system endowed with different output selections. This enables a unified linearizing controller that negotiates between full and reduced tasks without transients on shared outputs under compatibility and dwell-time conditions. Simulations on a fully actuated aerial platform illustrate graceful task downgrades from six-dimensional pose tracking as lateral-force channels are deactivated.

</details>


### [505] [Reachability-based Temporal Logic Verification for Reliable LLM-guided Human-Autonomy Teaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08633)
*Joonwon Choi,Kartik Anand Pant,Karthik Nune,Inseok Hwang*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于可达性分析的LLM引导人机协作框架，使用信号时序逻辑作为中介语言，通过可行性过滤器确保指令可执行性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升人机协作的可靠性，解决自然语言指令可能不符合系统动力学约束的问题，实现安全有效的人机通信

Method: 1) LLM作为翻译器转换自然语言与STL规范；2) STL可行性过滤器分解复杂公式为子公式并行验证；3) 可达性分析检查每个子公式对目标系统的可行性；4) 提供详细反馈指导指令修改

Result: 实验证明框架能成功过滤不可行子公式，并基于此信息生成有意义的反馈，实现更可靠的人机协作

Conclusion: 提出的基于可达性分析的框架通过STL可行性过滤器增强了LLM引导人机协作的可靠性，实现了安全且信息丰富的人机通信

Abstract: We propose a reachability-based framework for reliable LLM-guided human-autonomy teaming (HAT) using signal temporal logic (STL). In the proposed framework, LLM is leveraged as a translator that transfers natural language commands given by a human operator into corresponding STL specifications or vice versa. An STL feasibility filter (SFF) is proposed to check the feasibility of the generated STL. The SFF first decomposes the complex and nested LLM translation into a set of simpler subformulas for parallelization and informative feedback generation. The reachability analysis method is then applied to verify if each subformula is feasible for a target dynamical system: if feasible, perform mission planning, otherwise, reject it. The proposed SFF can identify infeasible subformulas, more than simply providing the boolean verification results for the whole STL, thereby facilitating the feedback generation of LLM to request modification of the command to the human. Consequently, the proposed framework can allow more reliable HAT by enabling safe and informative communication between the human operator and the autonomous agent. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework can successfully filter out infeasible subformulas and generate informative feedback based on such information.

</details>


### [506] [Carbon-aware Market Participation for Building Energy Management Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.08654)
*Young-ho Cho,Mohamad Chehade,Fatima Al-Janahi,Sol Lim,Javad Mohammadi,Hao Zhu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出统一的实时建筑级碳感知能源管理系统，通过整合电网进口、储能和灵活需求，结合碳强度信号进行优化，实现显著减排而成本增加有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统能源管理系统主要关注经济效率，忽视了运营决策的环境影响。为应对气候变化，需要快速深度脱碳电力系统，因此需要开发能够同时考虑经济和环境因素的碳感知能源管理系统。

Method: 提出统一的实时建筑级碳感知能源管理系统框架，采用混合整数线性规划模型，将时变边际碳强度信号直接整合到目标函数中。为消除完美预测假设，引入基于Transformer的预测器驱动的模型预测控制扩展，联合预测电价和碳强度。

Result: 使用PJM电力市场的真实数据进行验证，模拟结果显示适度的碳价格可以实现22.5%的显著减排，而成本仅增加1.7%。

Conclusion: 该碳感知能源管理系统框架能够有效平衡经济和环境目标，通过整合碳强度信号和先进预测技术，为实现电力系统深度脱碳提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Tackling climate change requires the rapid and deep decarbonization of electric power systems. While energy management systems (EMSs) play a central role in this transition, conventional EMSs focus mainly on economic efficiency and often overlook the environmental impact of operational decisions. To address this gap, this paper proposes a unified, real-time building-level carbon-aware EMS (CAEMS) capable of simultaneously co-optimizing grid imports, energy storage, and flexible demand within a single integrated framework. We formulate a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) model that directly integrates time-varying marginal carbon intensity signals into the EMS objective for coordinated participation in both day-ahead (DA) and real-time (RT) markets. To relax the unrealistic assumption of perfect foresight, we incorporate a model predictive control (MPC) extension driven by a Transformer-based forecaster that jointly predicts electricity prices and carbon intensity. The proposed CAEMS is validated using real-world data from the PJM electricity market. Simulation results demonstrate that modest carbon prices can achieve a significant 22.5% reduction in emissions with only a 1.7% increase in cost.
